status_evidence: The provisions for the RTC were amended and extended as part of the 1999 Budget Law.
importance_rationale: The reform significantly alters the structure and duration of the RTC, which is a key instrument for stimulating R&D investment in France, particularly for SMEs.
description: The draft 1999 Budget Law amends the provisions for the Research Tax Credit (RTC), extending it for another five years and making it a negotiable claim to assist SMEs in their dealings with banks, while also making it immediately refundable for start-ups during their first three years of business.
source_quote: The draft 1999 Budget Law amends the provisions for the RTC, which has been extended for another five years.

growth_orientation_rationale: The modernization of health systems through technology is expected to enhance efficiency and reduce costs, contributing positively to the economy.
status_evidence: By mid-1999, 35 million insured households should have received the Sesam-Vitale chip card.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant step towards digitizing health services, which can lead to improved service delivery and cost savings.
description: The French government is implementing the Sesam-Vitale chip card system to replace paper social security cards, facilitating electronic transmittal of social security forms and improving efficiency in health reimbursements.
source_quote: By mid-1999, 35 million insured households should have received the Sesam-Vitale chip card, which is meant to replace the paper social security card.

growth_orientation_rationale: By lowering the cost of domestic services, the reform encourages formal employment and job creation in the sector.
status_evidence: The reform has been applied since the end of 1999 to promote job creation in domestic services.
importance_rationale: This reform is a significant policy change aimed at enhancing employment in the domestic services sector, with expected positive economic impacts.
description: The application of a reduced rate of VAT for domestic work and home services, initiated at the end of 1999, is expected to create several thousand jobs and reduce unrecorded employment.
source_quote: The application of the reduced rate of VAT for domestic work and home services to individuals since the end of 1999 should permit the creation of several thousand jobs.

growth_orientation_rationale: By linking budget resources to performance outcomes, the initiative aims to improve efficiency and productivity in the public sector, which can positively impact overall economic growth.
status_evidence: The pilot experiments with performance contracts were initiated in 1999.
importance_rationale: The introduction of performance contracts represents a significant shift towards a more results-oriented public sector management approach, which can lead to improved efficiency and effectiveness in government operations.
description: In 1999, France initiated pilot experiments with performance contracts aimed at enhancing public sector efficiency. These contracts allow government agencies to manage budgetary appropriations flexibly while committing to performance targets defined by public service user expectations.
source_quote: In France, an approach of this type was initiated in 1999, in the form of pilot experiments with performance contracts.

growth_orientation_rationale: The ecological taxes are designed to fund environmental initiatives, which can lead to innovation in sustainable practices and technologies.
status_evidence: The ecological taxes have been enacted and are currently in effect.
importance_rationale: The introduction of ecological taxes represents a significant policy change aimed at environmental sustainability.
description: In 1999, France introduced two ecological taxes aimed at reducing water pollution, which are part of the General Tax on Polluting Activities (TGAP). These taxes target detergent phosphates and agricultural pesticides, with revenues intended to support environmental initiatives.
source_quote: In 1999, two ecological taxes aimed at reducing water pollution were created and included in the General Tax on Polluting Activities (TGAP).

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing IT skills among students is expected to improve human capital, which is crucial for future innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: The government has announced its intention to introduce IT and Internet courses for all students in teacher training colleges.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to integrate technology into education, which can have lasting impacts on the skill development of future generations.
description: The French government aims to modernize the education system by equipping schools with computers and improving internet access, targeting a reduction in the average number of pupils per microcomputer by the year 2000.
source_quote: The government has also announced that it intends to introduce IT and Internet courses for all students in teacher training colleges for the next school year.

growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing administrative burdens, the reform aims to foster entrepreneurship and facilitate the creation of new businesses, which can enhance economic growth.
status_evidence: The government is continuing its policy of simplifying legislation and reducing administrative formalities.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change aimed at improving the entrepreneurial climate, which is crucial for economic recovery and growth.
description: The French government is continuing its policy of simplifying legislation and reducing administrative formalities for small businesses, which includes tax exemptions and the creation of an Internet portal for business registration.
source_quote: The government’s policy of simplifying legislation and reducing administrative formalities... is being continued in 2000 with a further wave of taxes being scrapped.

growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating investment in innovative firms, this reform is expected to enhance the availability of capital for startups and promote innovation.
status_evidence: The regulations have been improved to allow investment in any innovative firm.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in the regulatory framework for investment in innovation, potentially increasing funding for innovative companies.
description: The regulations for mutual funds investing in innovative companies have been improved, allowing these funds to invest in any company approved by the National Agency for the Promotion of Research (ANVAR), thus enhancing financial support for innovative firms.
source_quote: The FCPI regulations have been improved to allow investment in any innovative firm.

growth_orientation_rationale: These measures aim to lower the barriers to entry for new businesses, thereby encouraging entrepreneurship and innovation.
status_evidence: In April 2000 the authorities announced a new set of measures to facilitate starting a business.
importance_rationale: While significant, these measures are part of a broader initiative to improve the business environment rather than a standalone major reform.
description: The French authorities announced a new set of measures to facilitate starting a business, including the abolition of registration taxes and the creation of an Internet portal for entrepreneurs.
source_quote: In April 2000 the authorities announced a new set of measures to facilitate starting a business.

growth_orientation_rationale: These measures are intended to stimulate the establishment of new technology firms, which can drive innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The government announces the launch of a set of measures, worth FF 200 million, designed to facilitate the creation of technology firms.
importance_rationale: While significant, these measures are part of a broader strategy and do not represent a complete overhaul of the innovation system.
description: The government announced a set of measures worth FF 200 million to facilitate the creation of technology firms.
source_quote: The government announces the launch of a set of measures, worth FF 200 million, designed to facilitate the creation of technology firms.

growth_orientation_rationale: The elimination of taxes and provision of credits are expected to incentivize new enterprise creation, fostering innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The measures have been put into effect as part of the government's support for enterprise creation.
importance_rationale: The measures represent a significant but not structural change in supporting enterprise creation.
description: The government announced measures to support enterprise creation, including the elimination of all state taxes on enterprise creation and the provision of new credits for enterprises in new technology and proximity areas.
source_quote: The Prime Minister announces measures to support enterprise creation: all state taxes on enterprise creation are eliminated; new credits will be provided to enterprises working in the new technology and proximity areas.

growth_orientation_rationale: By providing financial incentives for renewable energy production, the feed-in tariffs encourage investment in clean technologies, which can lead to increased innovation and job creation in the sector.
status_evidence: Feed-in tariffs were first introduced in 2001-02 for electricity generation technologies.
importance_rationale: The introduction of feed-in tariffs represents a significant structural change in France's energy policy, aimed at fostering the growth of renewable energy sources and reducing reliance on fossil fuels.
description: The French government has implemented feed-in tariffs to promote renewable energy, ensuring that electricity producers can at least break even on their investments. These tariffs are set above market prices for various renewable energy sources, including solar and wind, to encourage the development of these technologies.
source_quote: Feed-in tariffs were first introduced in 2001-02 for electricity generation technologies that make use of solar, wind, tidal wave, geothermal and hydro energy.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in hospital infrastructure is expected to enhance healthcare delivery and innovation in medical services.
status_evidence: The reform has been successfully implemented.
importance_rationale: This reform involves a substantial financial commitment to improve healthcare infrastructure.
description: The Ministry of Health introduced the 'Le plan Hôpital 2007' reform, which includes additional investment funds of €6 billion to improve the physical plant and materials in the hospital sector, overseen by a national agency.
source_quote: At the end of 2002, the Ministry of Health introduced a reform of the hospital sector (Le plan Hôpital 2007). This programme proposed a number of measures aimed at rectifying a number of these problems in the hospital sector.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reforms aim to increase R&D spending and improve resource allocation, which are expected to enhance innovation and productivity.
component_name: National Science Fund and Research and Technology Fund
status_evidence: The National Science Fund and Research and Technology Fund have been established and are operational.
importance_rationale: The creation of national funds and a comprehensive innovation plan represent significant structural changes in R&D funding.
description: The recent creation of the National Science Fund and the Research and Technology Fund aims to enhance the responsiveness of public-sector research to business and societal needs by improving the allocation of resources between programmes and research areas. Additionally, the 'Innovation Plan' announced in April 2003 aims to increase total R&D spending from 2.2% of GDP to 3% by 2010, with a focus on boosting private sector R&D investment.
source_quote: The 'Innovation Plan' announced in April 2003 hopes to raise total Research and Development (R&D) spending from its current level of 2.2 per cent of GDP to 3 per cent by 2010.

growth_orientation_rationale: The establishment of a collaborative network is expected to enhance innovation through improved partnerships between industry and research.
status_evidence: The measures have been put into practice and are operational.
importance_rationale: While significant, the measures represent a narrower reform compared to larger funding initiatives.
description: France has introduced measures to increase incentives for innovation, including the establishment of a network of industrialists and research laboratories to foster collaboration.
source_quote: Efforts to stimulate R&D. Measure have been undertaken to increase incentives for innovation, including the establishment of network of industrialists and research laboratories.

growth_orientation_rationale: These tax incentives are designed to stimulate R&D investment among startups, thereby fostering innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The measures have been announced but may not yet be fully implemented.
importance_rationale: The introduction of significant tax exemptions for innovative firms represents a major reform in innovation policy.
description: The government has introduced measures to exonerate young and innovative firms from corporate income tax for their first three profitable years and provide various tax exemptions to encourage R&D investments.
source_quote: The creation and survival of young and innovative firms include exonerating such enterprises from corporate income tax for their first three profitable years.

growth_orientation_rationale: By promoting collaboration and innovation within clusters, the initiative aims to boost productivity and competitiveness in various sectors.
status_evidence: The programme of competitiveness clusters was launched in 2004 and has been actively supported since.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a structural change in how innovation is fostered in France, aiming to create synergies between various stakeholders in the economy.
description: The French government has launched a programme of 'competitiveness clusters' to enhance innovation and regional development by fostering collaboration among firms, research centres, and educational institutions.
source_quote: In 2004, the authorities launched an ambitious programme of 'competitiveness clusters' (pôles de compétitivité), which aims at promoting clusters.

growth_orientation_rationale: The initiative aims to enhance the employability of older workers, thereby increasing their participation in the labor market and contributing to overall economic productivity.
component_name: Employment Rate Initiative for Older Workers
status_evidence: The government announced the plan and initiated measures to support older workers.
importance_rationale: The plan represents a significant effort to address demographic challenges in the labor market, focusing on a specific age group and introducing new employment contracts.
description: The government announced the Plan d’action concerté pour l’emploi senior, aiming to increase the employment rate of 55-64 year-olds to 50% by 2010 through various measures, including the introduction of a short-term employment contract for older workers.
source_quote: The government announced the Plan d’action concerté pour l’emploi senior which aims to increase the employment rate of 55-64 year-olds to 50% from the current 37%, by 2010.

growth_orientation_rationale: By improving budgetary processes and accountability, the reform aims to enhance the efficiency of public spending, potentially leading to better economic outcomes.
status_evidence: The LOLF first came into full force in 2006.
importance_rationale: The LOLF represents a structural change in how public finances are managed, aiming for greater efficiency and accountability, which is crucial for fiscal sustainability.
description: The adoption of the State Finance Framework Law (LOLF) introduced mechanisms to improve the utilization of budgeted resources, enhancing accountability and transparency in public spending.
source_quote: The main contribution of the LOLF was to introduce mechanisms to improve the utilisation of budgeted resources.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving internet access is expected to enhance productivity and innovation capabilities in underserved areas.
status_evidence: The initiative was announced with a target implementation year.
importance_rationale: While significant, the reform focuses on infrastructure rather than a broad systemic change.
description: The French government aims to enable high-speed Internet access in all municipalities by 2007, providing financial aid to ensure coverage in areas lacking such access.
source_quote: The government has an objective of enabling high speed Internet access in all French municipalities by 2007, which has led the government to provide financial aid to secure coverage for the large number of municipalities without high speed Internet access.

growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing competitive funding for research, the agency aims to stimulate high-quality research outputs, which can lead to innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The agency was established in 2007 and has been operational since then.
importance_rationale: The establishment of the National Research Agency represents a significant reform in the governance of public R&D funding, aiming to improve the effectiveness and efficiency of research investments.
description: The National Research Agency was created to provide competitive funding for research projects, aiming to enhance the quality and transparency of public R&D financing.
source_quote: The creation in January 2007 of the National Research Agency... opened another channel of public financing for research projects.

growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing autonomy, universities can better manage resources and respond to market needs, potentially leading to improved educational outcomes and innovation.
status_evidence: The law was promulgated in August 2007 and has been adopted by several universities.
importance_rationale: This reform significantly alters the governance structure of universities, which can lead to improved efficiency and responsiveness in higher education.
description: The Universities Freedom and Responsibility Act was enacted to grant greater autonomy to French universities, enhancing their governance and financial management.
source_quote: The Universities Freedom and Responsibility Act... lays the groundwork for greater autonomy for French universities.

growth_orientation_rationale: This reform incentivizes private investment in SMEs, enhancing their capital base and growth potential, which can lead to increased innovation and job creation.
status_evidence: The tax measures raised nearly EUR 1 billion for investment in SMEs.
importance_rationale: This reform significantly enhances the financial incentives for private investment in SMEs, which is crucial for their growth and innovation capacity.
description: The Law to Promote Work, Employment and Purchasing Power introduced a new tax advantage allowing ISF taxpayers to reduce their tax liability by investing in SMEs, raising nearly EUR 1 billion for investment in these firms in its first year.
source_quote: The Law to Promote Work, Employment and Purchasing Power instituted a new tax advantage allowing ISF taxpayers to reduce their tax liability by subscribing directly to the capital of SMEs.

growth_orientation_rationale: By providing generous tax incentives, the reform encourages firms to increase their investment in research and development, which can lead to greater innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The 2008 reform simplified its use considerably and increased its visibility.
importance_rationale: This reform significantly enhances the attractiveness of the research tax credit, potentially leading to a substantial increase in private sector R&D investment.
description: The 2008 reform of the research tax credit simplified its use and increased its visibility, making it one of the most generous incentives in the OECD. This reform aims to enhance private sector research efforts by providing substantial tax relief.
source_quote: The 2008 reform simplified its use considerably and increased its visibility, but at the same time it made it one of the most generous incentives anywhere in the OECD.

growth_orientation_rationale: Streamlining export assistance through Ubifrance is expected to enhance the efficiency of support for businesses, thereby promoting innovation and competitiveness.
status_evidence: The reform was launched in February 2008 to enhance Ubifrance's role.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in the structure of export assistance, aiming to improve coordination and effectiveness in supporting international business development.
description: A reform was launched to make Ubifrance the centerpiece of a government mechanism to support international business development, establishing a framework for partnership with consular networks and enhancing its role in economic missions.
source_quote: Launched in February 2008, one reform made Ubifrance the centerpiece of a government mechanism to support international business development.

growth_orientation_rationale: By consolidating support mechanisms for SMEs, the programme aims to enhance their international competitiveness and innovation capacity.
status_evidence: The CapExport programme was reformulated in 2008 to better support SMEs.
importance_rationale: The reform of the CapExport programme represents a significant enhancement of existing support for SMEs, aiming to improve their export capabilities and innovation.
description: The 'CapExport' programme bundles various types of assistance for entering new markets, which was reformulated in 2008 to enhance support for SMEs in their export efforts.
source_quote: The CapExport programme... was reformulated in 2008.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing access to venture capital for early-stage start-ups, this reform supports innovation and entrepreneurship, which are vital for economic growth.
status_evidence: The authorities took steps to modernize venture-capital instruments.
importance_rationale: This reform significantly improves the landscape for venture capital, which is crucial for fostering innovation and supporting start-ups.
description: The Economic Modernisation Act modernized venture-capital instruments by creating specialized funds that invest in early-stage start-ups and simplifying existing EU-level venture-capital measures.
source_quote: The LME took steps to modernise venture-capital instruments, by creating specialised funds that invest in unlisted 'early-stage' start-ups.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in infrastructure is crucial for improving the quality of education and research capabilities, which can lead to enhanced innovation.
status_evidence: The initiative has been executed as part of the government's commitment to enhance higher education.
importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant investment in the physical infrastructure of higher education.
description: The French government launched the 'Plan Campus' initiative with a funding of EUR 5 billion aimed at renovating campus buildings and enhancing the infrastructure of higher education institutions.
source_quote: The Plan Campus, launched at the end of 2008 with funding of EUR 5 billion, covers the renovation of campus buildings.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhances collaboration between educational institutions and promotes research capabilities, which can lead to innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: Four advanced R&D centres were created in 2009 and three in 2010.
importance_rationale: The creation of R&D centres represents a significant step towards enhancing research collaboration and infrastructure, which is crucial for innovation.
description: The establishment of advanced R&D centres (Pôles de recherche et d’enseignement supérieur, PRES) initiated closer cooperation between grandes écoles and universities, with four created in 2009 and three in 2010, totaling 18, supported by 'centres of excellence' as part of 'investments for the future'.
source_quote: The establishment of advanced R&D centres (Pôles de recherche et d’enseignement supérieur, PRES), which initiated closer co-operation between the grandes écoles and the universities in 2007, is continuing.

growth_orientation_rationale: This substantial funding is aimed at enhancing research capabilities and fostering innovation through targeted investments.
package_name: Future Investment in Education and Research
status_evidence: The programme has been actively funded and implemented as part of the government's strategy.
importance_rationale: The programme represents a major commitment to funding research and education.
description: The 'investing in the future' programme allocates EUR 35 billion over 10 years to benefit the higher education and research sector, with a significant portion directed towards 'clusters of excellence'.
source_quote: About two-thirds of the 2010 'investing in the future' programme, with total funding of 35 billion over 10 years, will benefit the higher education and research sector.

growth_orientation_rationale: Reducing inefficient tax expenditures can increase government revenues and improve the allocation of resources, potentially enhancing overall economic efficiency.
status_evidence: The government has committed to specific cuts in tax expenditures for the years 2011-2014.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the approach to tax expenditures, aiming to enhance fiscal sustainability and efficiency in public finances.
description: The French government committed to a EUR11 billion cut in tax expenditures for 2011 and annual cuts of EUR3 billion for 2012-14, aiming to improve fiscal sustainability and reduce inefficiencies in the tax system.
source_quote: The government has committed to a EUR11 billion cut in tax expenditures for 2011 and annual cuts of EUR3 billion for 2012-14.

growth_orientation_rationale: This initiative is expected to enhance consumer awareness and drive demand for environmentally friendly products, potentially leading to innovation in sustainable product design.
status_evidence: A trial period will be launched in July 2011.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift towards transparency in environmental impacts, which can influence consumer behavior and promote innovation in product development.
description: The Grenelle laws mandate the obligatory display of the environmental impact of consumer products, aiming to cover all products across sectors, with a trial period starting in July 2011.
source_quote: The Grenelle laws set the ambitious goal of requiring an obligatory displaying of the over-the-lifecycle environmental impact of consumer products.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reforms aim to enhance flexibility and innovation in the labour market, which can lead to increased productivity and economic growth.
package_name: Labour Market and Innovation Clusters Reform
status_evidence: The reforms have been put into effect as part of the government's strategy.
importance_rationale: The reforms represent significant structural changes in the labour market and innovation ecosystem.
description: The French government is reforming the labour market to provide employees with new rights and employers with greater flexibility, including the possibility to negotiate firm-level agreements. Additionally, the 2012 National Pact for Growth, Competitiveness and Employment distinguishes internationally oriented strategic clusters from those dedicated to regional development, evaluating projects based on their economic outcomes and innovation diffusion.
source_quote: The 2012 National Pact for Growth, Competitiveness and Employment includes a commitment to distinguish the internationally oriented strategic clusters from those dedicated to regional development.

growth_orientation_rationale: The focus on competitiveness and the transition to private financing are expected to enhance innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: The reform has been in place since 2013 and is currently operational.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in how state aid is provided to competitiveness clusters, emphasizing results and private financing.
description: The new 'competitiveness clusters' phase (2013-18) includes a target for assessment between year-end 2015 and early 2018, with state aid contingent on results and gradually replaced by private financing.
source_quote: The new 'competitiveness clusters' phase (2013-18) includes a target for assessment between year-end 2015 and early 2018.

growth_orientation_rationale: The assessment of innovation policy is expected to improve the effectiveness of R&D funding and support.
status_evidence: The reports and board have been established and are operational.
importance_rationale: While significant, the reforms are more about assessment and reporting rather than direct funding changes.
description: A university impact study and a report on the research tax credit (CIR) were published in 2014, and a board to assess innovation policy was instituted.
source_quote: A university impact study and a report on the CIR were published in 2014.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reforms aim to enhance collaboration and reduce barriers, which can lead to increased innovation and competitiveness.
status_evidence: The law has been enacted and is currently in force.
importance_rationale: The reforms represent a significant structural change in the approach to innovation policy in France.
description: The 2015 law on growth, activity and equal opportunities aims to improve the competitive environment by reducing barriers to entry and enhancing public-private collaboration in innovation. Additionally, the programme d’investissements d’avenir is designed to support this collaboration and entrepreneurship, emphasizing thematic objectives and evaluation to align research activities with national priorities.
source_quote: The 2015 law on growth, activity and equal opportunities improved the competitive environment in a number of areas.

growth_orientation_rationale: The youth guarantee aims to improve employability and skills, while the support for startups is intended to enhance productivity and innovation.
status_evidence: The youth guarantee program is set to be gradually introduced by 2017, and the startup support measures have been announced.
importance_rationale: Both components represent significant policy changes aimed at improving human capital and supporting the startup ecosystem.
description: The French government is implementing a 'youth guarantee' program aimed at providing 18-25 year-olds in precarious situations with guaranteed income and work experience through individualized coaching and alternating periods of work and training. Additionally, plans have been announced to streamline administrative procedures and increase funding opportunities for innovative start-up businesses, aiming to enhance productivity and growth.
source_quote: Streamlining administrative procedures, including the tax system and government support, as well as increasing funding opportunities for innovative start-up businesses, together with improving public procurement practices, would allow substantial productivity gains and growth.

growth_orientation_rationale: The fund aims to enhance innovation capacity in high-tech sectors, which can lead to increased productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The fund was set up to provide funding for deep tech innovations.
importance_rationale: The establishment of the FII represents a significant structural change in funding innovation, targeting high-tech sectors and societal challenges, which is crucial for long-term economic growth.
description: A new innovation fund (Fonds pour l’innovation et l’industrie, FII) was established in 2018 to provide funding for deep tech innovations, supporting start-ups in high-tech capital-intensive sectors and funding disruptive innovation projects that address societal challenges.
source_quote: A new innovation fund (Fonds pour l’innovation et l’industrie, FII) has been set up in 2018 to provide funding for deep tech innovations.

growth_orientation_rationale: The fund aims to enhance R&D investment in radical innovations, which can lead to increased productivity and economic growth.
component_name: Fonds pour l’innovation et la rupture
status_evidence: The fund was established to support radical technological innovation.
importance_rationale: The establishment of a dedicated fund for radical innovation represents a significant shift in France's approach to fostering high-impact R&D, which is crucial for long-term economic competitiveness.
description: France created a specific investment fund for supporting radical technological innovation, known as the Fonds pour l’innovation et la rupture (FII), in 2018.
source_quote: Moreover, a specific investment fund for supporting radical technological innovation (Fonds pour l’innovation et la rupture, FII) was created in 2018.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the skills of less qualified individuals, the plan aims to improve their employability and productivity, contributing positively to economic growth.
status_evidence: The plan is actively being rolled out with regional commitments.
importance_rationale: This substantial investment in human capital is expected to have a long-term impact on the workforce's skills and employability, addressing critical gaps in the labor market.
description: The French government has launched the skills investment plan (Plan d’investissement dans les compétences—PIC), allocating EUR 15 billion to improve access to long courses and personal guidance for less qualified young people and jobseekers from 2018 to 2022.
source_quote: Under the skills investment plan (Plan d’investissement dans les compétences—PIC), EUR 15 billion will be spent on improving their access to long courses providing qualifications and providing personal guidance between 2018 and 2022.

growth_orientation_rationale: By improving apprenticeship schemes, the reform is expected to enhance the skills of the workforce, thereby supporting innovation and productivity in the economy.
status_evidence: The law was enacted in 2018, establishing the new framework for apprenticeships.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the management of apprenticeships, aiming to improve the quality and accessibility of vocational training, which is crucial for addressing skills shortages in the labor market.
description: The 2018 apprenticeship reform introduced a new operator, France Compétences, to manage apprenticeships, shifting responsibility from regional governments. This reform aims to enhance the attractiveness of apprenticeships through simplified procedures and increased financial support for apprentices.
source_quote: The 2018 law 'Loi pour la liberté de choisir son avenir professionnel' entrusted a new operator—France Compétences—and the professional branches with responsibility for apprenticeship.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing the ANR budget and ensuring predictable funding will enhance the quality and relevance of research projects, thereby supporting innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The recent increases in the ANR budget with the aim to increase success rates over 20% is welcome.
importance_rationale: The increase in funding for the ANR is a significant reform aimed at improving the effectiveness of public research funding, which is essential for fostering innovation.
description: The budget of the National Research Agency (ANR) has been increased to improve the success rates of research project funding, alongside plans for a multi-annual financial framework to ensure predictable public research funding.
source_quote: The recent increases in the ANR budget with the aim to increase success rates over 20% together with the plan to set up a multi-annual financial framework for research is welcome.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in digital technologies in public administration can lead to cost savings and improved service delivery, enhancing overall public sector efficiency.
status_evidence: Initiatives to develop the diffusion of digital technologies in public administration are moving ahead.
importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant effort to modernize public services through digitalization, which is expected to yield positive outcomes in terms of efficiency and service quality.
description: The Grand plan d’investissement aims to boost e-government initiatives, including the modernization of public services through digital technologies, which is expected to improve efficiency and service delivery.
source_quote: Boosting e-government as foreseen in the Grand plan d’investissement would also benefit from strengthening efforts to provide attractive career prospects for IT specialists.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing access to training and improving its quality, the reform is expected to raise the skill levels of the workforce, thereby supporting productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The reform was launched in 2018 and is set to be fully operational by 2021.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of the training system, aiming to simplify access and improve quality, which is crucial for enhancing the skills of the workforce and addressing inequality in training access.
description: The 2018 reform of continuous training aims to improve access to and the quality of training courses for low-skilled workers and jobseekers by monetising the personal training account and establishing a single financing body.
source_quote: The training section of the Act for the freedom to choose one’s future career, which passed into law in September 2018, aims to simplify the training system, strengthen personal initiative and guidance, and to improve the quality and relevance of training.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased funding for research is expected to stimulate innovation and improve productivity in the long run.
status_evidence: The law has been enacted to increase the budget of the National Research Agency.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in public R&D funding, which is crucial for enhancing France's research capabilities and competitiveness.
description: The law on research planning 2021-2030 provides for an increase in the budget of the National Research Agency, aiming to enhance public funding for research and development activities.
source_quote: The law on research planning 2021-2030 provides for an increase in the budget of the National Research Agency.

growth_orientation_rationale: The investment in innovation and competitiveness is expected to enhance productivity and stimulate economic growth through improved business performance.
status_evidence: The plan has been rolled out with significant financial commitments.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a substantial investment in innovation and competitiveness, aiming to transform the economic landscape post-COVID-19.
description: The France Relance recovery plan includes EUR 34 billion dedicated to competitiveness and innovation, which encompasses tax cuts, corporate equity-building measures, and support for digitalisation.
source_quote: The France Relance recovery plan commits to EUR 100 billion worth of measures, including EUR 34 billion for competitiveness and innovation.

growth_orientation_rationale: The plan aims to enhance the employability of young people, thereby increasing their contribution to the economy and supporting overall productivity growth.
status_evidence: The plan has been rolled out with various support measures for young people.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant investment in human capital aimed at addressing youth unemployment and aligning skills with future job market needs.
description: The 'Un jeune, une solution' plan was initially launched to provide targeted support for young people under 26, including recruitment assistance and training for future job sectors, with a total budget of EUR 6.5 billion.
source_quote: The 'Un jeune, une solution' plan initially provided 1.3 million 'solutions' targeted at young people under 26 years of age for a total of EUR 6.5 billion announced in July 2020.

growth_orientation_rationale: Encourages the adoption of electric vehicles, reducing emissions and fostering innovation in the automotive industry.
status_evidence: The scheme was temporarily increased to support the automobile sector during the crisis.
importance_rationale: Significant enhancement of existing support schemes for electric vehicles, which has led to a substantial increase in sales and supports innovation in the sector.
description: The 'conversion premium' scheme and the 'ecological bonus' have been enhanced to support the sale of electric and hybrid vehicles, contributing to innovation in the automobile sector and increasing sales significantly in 2020.
source_quote: The 'conversion premium' was temporarily increased to support the automobile sector, severely hit by the crisis.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhances the effectiveness of environmental measures, potentially leading to better biodiversity outcomes and sustainable development.

This includes ensuring that subsidies for failing institutions are conditional on rapid improvement and prioritizing university positions in science and technology to enhance economic growth.
source_quote: The Science, Technology and Innovation Policy Strategy focuses on this issue. Financing of university positions in science and technology receives more priority than previously.

This includes prioritizing the allocation of finance to subject areas conducive to innovation and enhancing collaborative links between research institutions, schools, universities, and the business community.
source_quote: Increase research and development intensity and strengthen collaborative links between research institutions, schools, universities and the business community.

source_quote: To improve the responsiveness of the VET system to changing labour market needs, the government could forecast future skill needs.

source_quote: The government has committed to invest 1.4% of GDP per year into new national and international railways and in the modernisation of 1 000 km of existing rail tracks up to 2024.

source_quote: A fifth of RRF funds will be used to develop railway systems to double the number of passengers and reduce CO2 emission, notably through electrification and a shift toward urban public transport.

growth_orientation_rationale: This regulation is expected to enhance knowledge and incentives for energy efficiency improvements.
status_evidence: The regulation is operational and has been implemented.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it introduces new regulatory requirements.

source_quote: A new regulation, operational from November 2023, will see energy performance certificates apply to all newly constructed, sold and rented buildings with sanctions for non-compliance.

growth_orientation_rationale: This initiative supports environmental sustainability and urban mobility improvements.
status_evidence: The programme has been implemented with electric buses acquired.

source_quote: The Green Bus Programme can lead to lower emissions from local public buses and cut air pollution in urban areas.

growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating geothermal energy development supports sustainable energy production and economic growth.

source_quote: The March 2023 regulatory change to the Act on Mining simplified the licensing system for geothermal exploration and production of energy.

growth_orientation_rationale: This programme aims to enhance homeownership and modernisation, contributing to economic stability and growth.

source_quote: The Family Housing Support Programme provides preferential loans and grants for families with children, supporting homeownership and modernisation of dwellings.

source_quote: The Warm Homes Programme aims to provide non-refundable grants to improve the energy efficiency of houses and assist the development of renewable energy.

growth_orientation_rationale: This initiative is expected to significantly boost the economy by positioning Hungary as a key player in the electric vehicle supply chain.

source_quote: Hungary is planning to become a leading battery producer through a number of large-scale investments in battery production for electric cars.

source_quote: The need for upgrading the Research and Development infrastructure of the country...

growth_orientation_rationale: The focus on innovations for climate change mitigation is expected to drive technological advancements and create new market opportunities.

source_quote: The government is paying special attention to innovation... R&D grants are being funded through a new special levy on businesses and grant allocation for applied research is focusing more on research with strong commercial potential.

source_quote: Regulatory changes have made it easier for universities to create spin-off companies.

growth_orientation_rationale: The impact of promoting innovation policies is ambiguous without specific details on implementation.
status_evidence: The recommendation has been made but not yet acted upon.

description: To restore sustainable growth, Hungary is advised to promote innovation policies as part of a broader structural reform agenda aimed at increasing productivity and efficiency across various sectors.

source_quote: Recent measures to improve skills acquisition in VET schools include the establishment of Sectoral Skills Councils and a VET Innovation Council (particularly for preparing skills formation for Industry 4.0).

description: A new standards-based apprenticeship system was introduced in September 1993, replacing the traditional apprenticeship model with compulsory standards-based training and education, culminating in a National Craft Certificate. Additionally, the National Training Agency has undertaken a major overhaul of craft training, replacing traditional apprenticeships with modular courses that combine theoretical instruction and practical experience.
source_quote: A new standards-based apprenticeship system was introduced in September 1993 and will be generalised by September 1995.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the competitive capability of firms, the programme is expected to foster innovation and create sustainable jobs.

source_quote: The Operational Programme for Industrial Development 1994/99 is launched. The primary focus of the Operational Programme is to build up the competitive capability of indigenous firms.

growth_orientation_rationale: By providing training and improving job prospects, the programme supports workforce development and economic participation.

description: The Community Employment Programme (CEP) was introduced to replace existing employment schemes, significantly increasing participant numbers and providing training modules aimed at improving job prospects for the long-term unemployed.
source_quote: The government introduces a major new employment initiative, the Community Employment Programme (CEP).

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in education technology and training enhances the skills of the workforce, which is crucial for innovation and economic growth.

source_quote: The government has recognised its responsibilities in this area and in 1997 committed Ir£ 250 million to an Education Technology Investment Fund.

growth_orientation_rationale: The tax allowance encourages long-term unemployed individuals to seek employment, thereby increasing labor market participation and productivity.

description: A new programme called Job Assist was introduced, providing a special tax allowance for individuals unemployed for over a year, incentivizing them to take up employment.
source_quote: In 1998 a new programme called Job Assist was introduced. It is a special tax allowance for people unemployed over a year.

growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing the supply of housing and stabilizing prices, the initiative aims to enhance labor market flexibility and attract more workers, thereby supporting economic growth.

source_quote: The government announced a set of policy actions in April 1998, following recommendations made by the Bacon report.

growth_orientation_rationale: By providing venture capital, the fund supports the growth of innovative startups, which can drive economic growth and job creation.

source_quote: A National Seed Capital Fund was set up in mid-1998 with EU assistance to provide venture capital to early-stage small businesses.

growth_orientation_rationale: The programme is expected to enhance research capabilities, leading to increased innovation and productivity in the economy.

description: In November 1998, the Irish government announced a new three-year programme aimed at boosting science and research at the tertiary level, with transparent procedures for fund allocation.

source_quote: The government has now established an inter-departmental committee to evaluate, cost and prioritise the recommendations made by the various working groups that have recently reported.

growth_orientation_rationale: The introduction of a minimum wage is expected to improve income levels for low-wage workers, thereby enhancing overall economic participation and reducing poverty.

growth_orientation_rationale: These initiatives aim to address skill shortages and enhance workforce capabilities, which are essential for economic growth.

description: The government has established several initiatives to enhance human capital, including a skills fund to support enterprise training, a skills-based work permit system for non-EU nationals, and the National Training Fund to finance in-company training. Additionally, a Training Networks Programme was created to improve companies' capacity to address shared training needs.
source_quote: A skills fund has been set up to support enterprise training but with the labour market tight, the logic of the programme, which still needs to be more closely specified, is not clear.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in research infrastructure and funding enhances research capacity and collaboration, which supports innovation and economic growth.

description: The Programme for Research in Third Level Institutions (PRTLI) has significantly invested in upgrading Ireland's science infrastructure, allocating funding on a competitive basis to universities and technical institutes, which has led to the establishment of major research centres and increased research capacity. Additionally, Science Foundation Ireland (SFI) provides substantial funding for research in biotechnology and ICT, focusing on peer-reviewed grants that support researchers and collaborative efforts between academia and industry.
source_quote: This changed in the late 1990s when the government substantially boosted funding for research and development (R&D) and set up several granting agencies to deliver it.

growth_orientation_rationale: These measures are designed to stimulate entrepreneurship and innovation, which are critical for economic growth.

source_quote: Raising SME capacity to innovate and to build greater linkages between enterprises and the higher education sector would provide a new engine of growth.

growth_orientation_rationale: By streamlining access to innovation funding, the reform is expected to enhance the capacity of firms to innovate, thereby supporting economic growth.
status_evidence: The government plans to consolidate innovation funding and actions into fewer agencies.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in how innovation support is delivered, which could have widespread implications for the effectiveness of innovation policy in Ireland.
description: The government aims to simplify access to innovation support for firms by consolidating innovation funding and actions into fewer government agencies, enhancing the effectiveness and cost-efficiency of innovation and research policies.
source_quote: To increase the effectiveness and cost-efficiency of the innovation and research policies, and make it easier for businesses to access support, consolidate innovation funding and actions into a smaller number of Government agencies.

growth_orientation_rationale: Regular evaluation of innovation policies is expected to enhance their effectiveness, leading to better allocation of resources and improved outcomes for firms.
status_evidence: The government intends to evaluate all actions in the area of innovation policy regularly.
importance_rationale: This reform signifies a major shift towards evidence-based policy-making in innovation, which could lead to more effective use of public resources.
description: The government plans to independently and regularly evaluate all innovation policy tools to strengthen programs with proven higher returns and wind down those that are ineffective.
source_quote: Reflecting significant uncertainties about the effectiveness of various innovation policy tools, independently and regularly evaluate all actions in this area, strengthen programmes with proven higher returns, and wind down the others.

growth_orientation_rationale: By fostering entrepreneurial skills from a young age, the initiative is expected to enhance the self-employment rate among youth, contributing to economic growth.

importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to enhance youth entrepreneurship through education, which could have lasting impacts on the economy.

source_quote: To develop entrepreneurship skills among youth, entrepreneurship and the option to work for oneself could be better integrated into the Irish educational system.

importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in the approach to public research funding, aiming to enhance the relevance and impact of research on the economy.
description: The government is shifting its policy focus to achieve greater economic returns from investments in innovation by targeting publicly-funded research in higher education institutions and public research organizations towards the needs of the enterprise sector, focusing on 14 priority areas.
source_quote: The government’s policy focus has shifted to getting greater economic return from its investments in innovation.

growth_orientation_rationale: By creating a more conducive environment for startups, the initiative is expected to stimulate innovation and job creation in the economy.

source_quote: Beyond innovation specific policies it is important to establish a business environment where entrepreneurship and innovation can flourish.

growth_orientation_rationale: Shifting to direct grants is expected to enhance support for R&D, particularly for young firms and SMEs, thereby fostering innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but not yet legislated.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in the approach to innovation funding, indicating a major policy change.
description: Ireland's government has committed to rebalancing innovation support towards direct grants, moving away from an over-reliance on R&D tax credits to enhance public support for business R&D, particularly benefiting young firms and SMEs.
source_quote: Public support for business R&D is increasingly skewed towards R&D tax credits. Rebalance innovation support towards direct grants.

growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating collaboration between industry and research institutions is expected to drive innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The programme has been implemented with established research centres.
importance_rationale: This programme represents a significant effort to enhance knowledge transfer but is not a major structural reform.

source_quote: One initiative has been the establishment of 15 industry-led research centres by Enterprise Ireland and IDA Ireland.

growth_orientation_rationale: This initiative aims to leverage research for economic impact, fostering innovation in key sectors.
status_evidence: The initiative has been implemented with established research centres.
importance_rationale: While significant, this initiative is more focused and does not represent a major overhaul of the R&D system.
description: Science Foundation Ireland has established 17 research centres aimed at combining fundamental and applied research to create economic impact, partnering with industry to address strategic research questions.
source_quote: Science Foundation Ireland has established 17 geographically dispersed research centres that are co-funded with industry partners.

growth_orientation_rationale: These reforms are designed to enhance productivity and support technological advancements, which are crucial for economic growth.
status_evidence: The reform programme has been compiled and is in the planning stages.

description: The authorities have compiled a reform programme in response to various challenges, aligning public investment decisions with the Ireland 2040 planning framework to enhance productivity and support technological change. Additionally, the Central Bank of Ireland launched an 'Innovation Hub' to improve engagement between regulators and fintech firms, and several initiatives have been introduced to encourage the uptake of green technologies by firms.
source_quote: The government launched the new National Childcare Scheme in November 2019, shifting away from childcare benefits as social protection entitlements towards a comprehensive and progressive system of universal and income-based benefits.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing construction techniques, the strategy is expected to improve efficiency and productivity in the housing sector.

source_quote: The Housing for All Strategy aims to improve innovation and productivity of the residential construction sector.

growth_orientation_rationale: Encouraging local firms to engage in European technology programmes is expected to improve innovation capabilities and access to advanced technologies.

source_quote: The Icelandic Research Council was established in 1994 to encourage Icelandic firms to participate in European technology programmes.

source_quote: The new Fisheries Development Fund, which replaces the Fisheries Rationalisation Fund, has proffered grants of nearly IKr 3 billion to decommission some 8 per cent of Iceland's fishing fleet.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased funding for research and technology initiatives is expected to bolster R&D capacity and drive innovation.

importance_rationale: The funding increase is significant but does not represent a complete overhaul of the funding system.
description: Iceland's government increased funding to the Technological Fund by 20% in 1995 to support research and technology initiatives, aiming to enhance the country's R&D capacity.
source_quote: Efforts to boost R&D spending include a 20 per cent increase in funding to the Technological Fund in 1995.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reforms are designed to enhance investment incentives and improve the efficiency of financial institutions, which are expected to support economic growth.

status_evidence: The reforms were enacted and are currently in force.

description: The Icelandic government implemented a three-year tax reform programme aimed at reducing disincentives for investment and work, which included a reduction in the standard rate of income tax and changes to capital income taxation. Additionally, the Parliament passed laws to restructure government-owned financial institutions, transforming state banks into corporations and creating the Icelandic Investment Bank to consolidate various industrial investment credit funds.
source_quote: In the 1997 budget, the first stage of a three-year reform of the tax system was implemented, covering the taxation of income from employment, pensions and capital as well as the payroll tax.

growth_orientation_rationale: The fund aims to stimulate entrepreneurship and support the growth of new businesses, which can enhance economic development.

importance_rationale: The establishment of the fund is a significant initiative to support start-ups, though it is not as transformative as the tax reform.

source_quote: Another institution – the New Business Venture Fund – was also created by removing parts of their existing activities from the four above-mentioned funds before they were merged into the IIB.

source_quote: The government has embarked on its own programme to invest in that area through education, with plans to include instruction on the use of such technology at all grade levels, and health care where action is under way to wire all health institutions and administrators in one 'Health Net' and develop the infrastructure for 'telemedicine'.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reform aims to ensure sustainable fishing practices, which can enhance long-term productivity and resource management.

source_quote: The Icelandic Centre for Research provides funds for R&D, generally through competitive funds for research, innovation, education and culture, as well as strategic research programmes.

source_quote: The Tourism Policy and Action Plan for 2030 was approved by Parliament in June 2024. It includes 43 actions, some of which aim to reduce regulatory burdens and strengthen competition.

This aims to clarify the criteria for foreign direct investment screening and provide necessary legal tools to address potential threats to national security.
