description: Luxembourg has implemented several reforms to modernise hospitals and improve quality, including linking part of the budget funding to quality standards assessed by an external committee.
source_quote: Since 1998, several reforms have been implemented to modernise hospitals and to increase their quality.

growth_orientation_rationale: These initiatives aim to improve the skills and employability of the workforce, which can enhance productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The framework law on lifelong learning was enacted, and training programs have been introduced.
importance_rationale: The reforms represent significant but not structural changes to workforce training and support systems.
description: The government has introduced various initiatives aimed at enhancing the employability of older workers and increasing female participation in the labor force. This includes training programs specifically for older workers in information technology, reforms to disability pensions for older workers, and a framework law on lifelong learning that provides tax reductions for enterprise-based training.
source_quote: The government intends to reform the law on disability pensions to provide assistance for older workers who are no longer as productive.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the legal framework for electronic commerce, this reform is expected to facilitate business transactions and innovation in the digital economy.
status_evidence: The law has been passed and is in force.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a major overhaul of the legal framework for electronic commerce.
description: Luxembourg passed a new law granting electronic signatures the same legal standing as handwritten ones, becoming the first EU country to do so. This law aims to enhance the legal framework for electronic commerce, particularly in the financial services sector.
source_quote: A new law giving an electronic signature the same legal standing as a hand-written one was passed in July, making Luxembourg the first EU country to pass such a law.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased R&D funding is expected to boost innovation capacity, leading to higher productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The budget proposal includes significant increases in R&D spending.
importance_rationale: The increase in R&D funding is a significant change in budget allocation aimed at enhancing innovation.
description: The budget for the central government in 2001 includes significant increases in spending on research and development, aiming to enhance innovation capacity.
source_quote: The budget for the central government contains significant rises in spending on infrastructure projects, notably road construction, on education, and on research and development.

growth_orientation_rationale: The cluster initiative is designed to enhance innovation and productivity by fostering collaboration among firms, which is expected to lead to economic growth.
status_evidence: The initiative has been actively supporting cluster development since its launch.
importance_rationale: The cluster initiative represents a structural change in how innovation is supported through collaboration.
description: The government launched a cluster initiative aimed at fostering communication and collaboration among cluster members, stimulating the development of collaborative projects, and enhancing the visibility of technological excellence in Luxembourg.
source_quote: In 2002, the government launched a cluster initiative, which, in its present form, pursues the following objectives: Foster communication and the exchange of knowledge and know-how between cluster and innovation network members.

growth_orientation_rationale: By simplifying the start-up process, the initiative is expected to reduce barriers for new businesses, thereby fostering entrepreneurship and innovation.
status_evidence: The government expects to take a major step towards reducing the administrative burden on business start-ups in 2003 by introducing one-stop shops.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant step towards improving the business environment, which is crucial for fostering innovation and entrepreneurship.
description: The government has initiated a project to develop one-stop shops (guichets uniques) to streamline the administrative processes for business start-ups, allowing all formalities to be handled via the Internet.
source_quote: The government, in co-operation with the municipalities, also expects to take a major step towards reducing the administrative burden on business start-ups in 2003 by introducing one-stop shops (the guichets uniques).

growth_orientation_rationale: Encouraging later retirement can enhance the labor supply and productivity, contributing positively to economic growth.
package_name: 2005 National Plan for Innovation and Full Employment
status_evidence: The objective of later retirement has been included in the national plan.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant policy direction aimed at addressing demographic challenges and labor market participation, with potential long-term benefits for the economy.
description: The government has included the objective of later retirement in the 2005 National Plan for Innovation and Full Employment, aiming to bring the effective age of retirement closer to the legal age through various measures.
source_quote: The authorities are aware of this challenge and have decided to include the objective of later retirement in their 2005 National Plan for Innovation and Full Employment.

growth_orientation_rationale: The availability of venture capital is expected to enhance the capacity of innovative SMEs to grow and contribute to economic development.
status_evidence: The public investment funds have been actively promoting venture capital availability since their establishment.
importance_rationale: The establishment of public investment funds represents a significant but narrower change in funding mechanisms for innovation.
description: The government is promoting the availability of venture capital through two public investment funds aimed at supporting innovative SMEs in sectors aligned with the government's cluster initiative.
source_quote: The government is promoting the availability of venture capital via two public investment funds that were established in 2012.

growth_orientation_rationale: This reform is expected to lower barriers to entry for startups, thereby fostering innovation and entrepreneurship.
status_evidence: The reform has been successfully implemented.
importance_rationale: While beneficial, this reform is a minor adjustment to existing company structures.
description: The introduction of a simplified limited liability company structure with a minimum capital requirement of 1 euro aims to facilitate the establishment of startups, particularly in the IT sector.
source_quote: The recent introduction in Luxembourg law of a simplified limited liability company with the minimum capital of 1 euro and simplified incorporation requirements are welcome.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reform aims to stimulate R&D activities among firms, which can lead to increased innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: The reform has been put into effect and is currently operational.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant adjustment to existing tax incentives, enhancing their targeting.
description: Luxembourg has introduced more targeted income-based R&D tax incentives to encourage research and development activities among firms, ensuring that only entities bearing the risk of developments located in Luxembourg receive relief. These incentives are likely to benefit larger firms disproportionately.
source_quote: The scheme was amended in April 2018 to only provide relief for entities bearing the risk of the developments that are located in Luxembourg.

growth_orientation_rationale: The strategy aims to improve productivity through digitalisation, which is expected to enhance economic performance.
status_evidence: The government has actively begun implementing the outlined reforms.
importance_rationale: This represents a structural change in the government's approach to innovation and productivity.
description: The new government has outlined its planned policy reforms for the 2018-2023 legislative period, including measures to enhance digitalisation and productivity growth.
source_quote: The new government has outlined its planned policy reforms for the 2018-2023 legislative period in the Coalition Agreement of November 2018.

growth_orientation_rationale: The investment in KBC and R&D support for SMEs is expected to enhance productivity and innovation, contributing positively to economic growth.
status_evidence: The government has actively supported R&D funding and cooperation initiatives, indicating successful implementation.
importance_rationale: The reforms involve significant but narrower changes in funding and support mechanisms for R&D and innovation.
description: Luxembourg aims to step up investment in knowledge-based capital (KBC) and enterprise innovation to maintain its position in global value chains and enhance productivity. The government financially supports private sector R&D through various direct programmes aimed primarily at SMEs, with a focus on increasing participation from young innovative enterprises. Additionally, the government aims to strengthen cooperation between enterprises, the University of Luxembourg, and research institutions both domestically and internationally to enhance innovation and productivity.
source_quote: The government financially supports private sector R&D by various direct programmes (mainly based on the 2009 law for the Promotion of Research, Development and Innovation).

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing public transport usage can reduce congestion and pollution, thereby enhancing overall urban efficiency and quality of life.
status_evidence: The government plans to increase the share of public transport in motorised transport.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant shift in transport policy aimed at enhancing public transport infrastructure, which is crucial for sustainable urban development.
description: Luxembourg plans to increase the share of public transport in motorised transport from 12% in 2002 to 25% by 2020, necessitating higher prices for individual road transport and extensive investments in public transport.
source_quote: Luxembourg plans to increase the share of public transport in motorised transport from 12% in 2002 to 25% by 2020.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased funding for green R&D is expected to drive innovation in energy efficiency, contributing to economic growth and sustainability.
status_evidence: Green R&D support rose sharply between 2010 and 2020.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant commitment to enhancing green innovation, which is crucial for achieving decarbonisation goals and fostering sustainable economic growth.
description: Luxembourg has increased its green R&D support significantly between 2010 and 2020, enhancing subsidies for energy efficiency investments for both households and firms.
source_quote: Green R&D support rising sharply between 2010 and 2020 has been augmented by increases in the subsidies to support energy efficiency investments for both households and firms.

growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing public transport usage, the initiative aims to reduce reliance on cars, thereby lowering emissions and improving urban mobility.
status_evidence: Public transport was made free following significant efforts to increase availability and quality.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in public transport policy, aiming to fundamentally change commuting patterns and reduce environmental impact.
description: Luxembourg introduced free public transport across all modes of transport in the country, expanding eligibility to include youth, young students, and low-income households. This initiative aims to improve access to public transport and reduce car usage.
source_quote: As of March 2020, Luxembourg introduced free public transport across all modes of transport in the country, expanding eligibility from the youth, young students and the lowest income households.

growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing the carbon price, the reform incentivizes firms to invest in cleaner technologies and reduces emissions, supporting the transition to a greener economy.
status_evidence: The carbon tax rate was raised as planned.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in environmental policy, aiming to align Luxembourg's carbon pricing with broader climate objectives and enhance the effectiveness of existing innovation programs.
description: The government introduced a carbon price that applies to all sectors outside the Emissions Trading Scheme, raising the carbon tax rate to EUR 25 in 2022 and planning to increase it to EUR 30 in 2023. This reform aims to provide a clearer price signal to encourage investments in the green transition.
source_quote: The government recently introduced a carbon price that applies to all sectors other than those in the ETS.

growth_orientation_rationale: Targeted public investment in innovation is expected to raise productivity and support economic diversification, which can enhance overall economic growth.
status_evidence: The government has outlined plans to better target public innovation investment.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in how public funds for innovation are allocated, aiming to improve the effectiveness of public investment in driving productivity.
description: The government aims to better target public innovation investment towards specific projects to enhance productivity growth and economic diversification.
source_quote: Public innovation investment should better target specific projects, while corporate R&D investment could be better supported through matching public funding.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in transport and charging infrastructure is expected to facilitate innovation and adoption of new technologies, contributing to economic growth.
status_evidence: The reforms have been implemented as of 2023.
importance_rationale: These initiatives represent a significant investment in the country's infrastructure, which is crucial for supporting innovation.
description: Luxembourg is enhancing its research infrastructure through various initiatives, including the Plan national de mobilité 2035, which aims to expand the public transport network and improve infrastructure with an investment of up to 1.7% of GDP between 2023 and 2027. Additionally, subsidy schemes for the purchase and installation of private charging stations for electric vehicles and publicly accessible charging infrastructures have been introduced to support the adoption of electric vehicles.
source_quote: The authorities have put in place a structured plan (Klimabonus programme) of financial and non-financial incentives to encourage owners to undertake energy-saving renovations.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reform aims to support entrepreneurship and business continuity, which are essential for economic growth.
status_evidence: The reform has been implemented as of 2023.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in the insolvency framework, promoting a more supportive environment for businesses.
description: In 2023, Luxembourg reformed its insolvency framework to promote business continuity and entrepreneurship by introducing a debt discharge mechanism for good-faith debtors and enhancing preventive measures against bankruptcy.
source_quote: The 2023 reform is a major positive step as it aims to foster company reorganisation over liquidation, promoting business continuity.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing public R&D funding and effectiveness, the reforms are expected to stimulate private sector investment in innovation.
status_evidence: The reforms have been announced and are set to be implemented in 2024.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in the approach to public R&D funding in Luxembourg.
description: Luxembourg aims to enhance its public support for R&D by increasing the effectiveness of government financial support to encourage business investment in innovation, moving beyond its current reliance on direct funding. The Luxembourg National Research Fund (FNR) has committed to funding public research activities with a ceiling of EUR 445 million from 2022 to 2025, supporting various research projects through grants and direct funding.
source_quote: The Luxembourg National Research Fund (FNR) is the main funder of public research activities, with funding commitments that can reach up to an overall ceiling of EUR 445 million over the years 2022-2025.

growth_orientation_rationale: Attracting venture capital investment is expected to enhance the growth and sustainability of SMEs, contributing to overall economic development.
status_evidence: The fund has been announced and is set to be implemented in 2024.
importance_rationale: While the fund represents a significant initiative, it does not constitute a major overhaul of the venture capital landscape.
description: The Luxembourg Future Fund 1, a EUR 150 million fund created in collaboration with the European Investment Fund, aims to attract venture capital investment to support the sustainable development of SMEs in strategic sectors.
source_quote: The Luxembourg Future Fund 1, which is a EUR 150 million fund that aims to attract venture capital investment to foster the sustainable development of SMEs in Luxembourg’s strategic sectors.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing the training leave scheme is expected to improve workforce skills and support vulnerable groups, contributing to overall productivity.
status_evidence: The reform has been announced and is set to be implemented in 2024.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant adjustment to the existing training leave scheme but does not constitute a major overhaul.
description: The individual training leave scheme in Luxembourg is set to be reformed to broaden its impact by enhancing customization and targeting of financial incentives to support vulnerable groups.
source_quote: The need to reform the individual training leave scheme to broaden its impact has been recognised in the 2023-2028 coalition agreement.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the effectiveness of public R&D support, the reforms are expected to stimulate private investment in innovation, thereby fostering economic growth.
status_evidence: The reforms have been officially announced and are set to be implemented in 2025.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in how public innovation support is organized and delivered.
description: Luxembourg is reforming its public innovation support system to streamline R&D support by shifting from institution-based to project-oriented support and enhancing public-private partnerships. This consolidation aims to make innovation support more mission-oriented and increase business R&D expenditure.
source_quote: Consolidating coordination of innovation support, making support more mission-oriented and further fostering public-private partnerships would help raise business R&D expenditure from very low levels.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving workforce skills and attracting international talent are expected to enhance innovation capacity and economic productivity.
status_evidence: The reforms have been announced and are set to be implemented in 2025.
importance_rationale: These initiatives represent a significant commitment to enhancing human capital in Luxembourg.
description: Luxembourg is strengthening quality standards for training providers to enhance workforce skills, which is crucial for innovation and productivity growth. Additionally, a job-search visa has been introduced for non-EU students who have completed their studies, allowing them to remain in the country for up to 12 months to seek employment or start a business.
source_quote: A job-search visa has been introduced for non-EU students who have completed their diploma, allowing them to look for a job or set up a business.

growth_orientation_rationale: By targeting funding towards R&D and SMEs, the reform is expected to enhance innovation capacity and economic diversification.
status_evidence: Funding schemes have been redefined in accordance with EU rules.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in funding priorities, aligning them with EU standards and enhancing support for innovation and regional development.
description: The Luxembourg government has redefined funding schemes to align with EU rules, focusing on regional development, small and medium-sized enterprises, research and development, and environmental protection.
source_quote: Funding schemes have been redefined in accordance with EU rules, i.e. have been focused on regional development, small and medium-size enterprises, research and development and environment protection.

growth_orientation_rationale: The establishment of a scientific council is expected to enhance knowledge transfer and improve healthcare practices.
status_evidence: The scientific council has been established and is operational.
importance_rationale: The establishment of the council represents a significant effort to improve health service quality through knowledge diffusion.
description: A scientific council has been established in the health sector to identify and diffuse best practices for high-quality health services.
source_quote: A scientific council has been established in the health sector to identify and diffuse best practices for high-quality health services.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing R&D spending, the initiatives are expected to improve competitiveness and innovation in key sectors.
status_evidence: The initiatives have been officially announced but are not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: The initiatives represent a significant but narrower reform aimed at boosting R&D spending.
description: The government has launched initiatives to promote research and development (R&D) spending, focusing on enhancing the financial sector's competitiveness and stimulating spending in areas where Luxembourg has existing strengths, such as logistics.
source_quote: Another avenue to pursue this objective (and to bolster productivity growth) is the government’s programme to stimulate spending on research and development (R&D) with a focus on areas where Luxembourg has some strength already, such as logistics.

growth_orientation_rationale: Simplifying work permits is expected to attract skilled workers, enhancing the talent pool for innovation.
status_evidence: The draft law has been officially announced but is not yet legislated.
importance_rationale: The draft law represents a significant reform aimed at improving the human capital landscape.
description: The government has presented a draft law to simplify work and entry permits for highly skilled workers and scientists, merging work and residence permits into one and allowing for special residence permits.
source_quote: The government has presented a draft law to parliament to simplify work and entry permits for workers and entrepreneurs.

growth_orientation_rationale: By fostering geographic concentration and collaboration among firms, the initiative is expected to drive innovation and productivity growth.
status_evidence: The initiative has been announced and is in the process of being implemented.
importance_rationale: The support for enterprise clusters represents a significant but narrower change in innovation policy.
description: The government is supporting the formation of enterprise clusters in sectors considered promising for Luxembourg, including eco-innovation technologies, healthcare, and information technologies. This initiative aims to enhance innovation and productivity growth by fostering geographic concentration of firms in related industries, providing networking, infrastructure investment, and financial support for research and development.
source_quote: The government is promoting the formation of enterprise clusters by providing networking, infrastructure investment and financial support for research and development.

growth_orientation_rationale: This initiative aims to enhance the skill set of the workforce, thereby improving employability and productivity.
status_evidence: The reform has been successfully implemented.
importance_rationale: The reform is significant in its targeted approach to skills development but does not represent a structural overhaul.
description: Luxembourg has introduced targeted training allowances for jobseekers, low-skilled workers, and older employees, providing financial support for skills development and lifelong learning.
source_quote: Targeted training allowances exist in Luxembourg for jobseekers, low-skilled workers, and older employees.

growth_orientation_rationale: These programs are designed to enhance the startup ecosystem by providing necessary resources and guidance to new entrepreneurs.
status_evidence: The programs have been successfully implemented.
importance_rationale: While beneficial, these programs are part of ongoing efforts to support startups rather than a major reform.
description: The government has initiated programs like Fit4Entrepreneurship and Fit4Start to support entrepreneurship through early-stage funding and coaching.
source_quote: Multiple programmes of support run by professional chambers together with ADEM exist in Luxembourg, including Fit4Entrepreneurship and Fit4Start.

growth_orientation_rationale: The focus on applied research and collaboration is expected to enhance innovation and productivity in the economy.
status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but is not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant structural change in how R&D is funded and organized in Luxembourg.
description: Luxembourg is implementing public-private partnerships to promote higher private investment in research and development, focusing on applied research and collaboration between the University of Luxembourg and other applied science institutions. This initiative is part of a long-term growth strategy known as the 'Third Industrial Revolution' strategy, which aims to prepare society for trends such as automation and the circular economy.
source_quote: To support the diversification of the economy, the government has formulated a long-term growth strategy centered on digitalization and renewable energies, the 'Third Industrial Revolution' strategy.

growth_orientation_rationale: Attracting skilled ICT workers is expected to enhance the talent pool and support innovation.
status_evidence: The new immigration schemes have been put into effect.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant adjustment to immigration policies aimed at skilled workers.
description: Luxembourg's government has created more favourable immigration schemes to attract qualified ICT workers, optimizing Blue Card requirements and lowering wage thresholds.
source_quote: The government created more favourable immigration schemes for a range of relevant occupations by optimizing Blue Card requirements and lowering the associated wage thresholds.

growth_orientation_rationale: Upskilling employees is crucial for maintaining competitiveness in a rapidly changing digital landscape.
status_evidence: The pilot programme has been launched and is currently operational.
importance_rationale: The programme represents a significant effort to address skills gaps in the workforce.
description: The 'Digital Skills Bridge' pilot programme provides technical and financial assistance to firms undergoing digital disruption, aiming to upskill employees and transition workers at risk of automation.
source_quote: The 'Digital Skills Bridge' aims to fill this gap by providing firms undergoing digital disruption with technical and financial assistance to upskill their employees.

growth_orientation_rationale: Supporting SMEs in digital adoption is expected to enhance their productivity and innovation capacity.
status_evidence: The agency has actively begun supporting SMEs in their digital transformation efforts.
importance_rationale: The expansion of Luxinnovation's role represents a significant adjustment in support for SMEs.
description: Luxembourg's innovation agency, Luxinnovation, has expanded its role to support digital adoption in SMEs by linking them with external experts and providing tailored recommendations.
source_quote: Luxinnovation also supports digital adoption in SMEs by linking firms with external experts.

growth_orientation_rationale: The strategy aims to build capabilities in AI, which is expected to drive innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The strategy has been officially announced but not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: This represents a significant commitment to advancing AI capabilities in the public sector.
description: Luxembourg has launched a national AI strategy to enhance skills related to AI development and use, aiming to position public administration as a frontrunner in AI.
source_quote: Luxembourg will shortly launch its national AI strategy.

growth_orientation_rationale: The investment in advanced research infrastructure is expected to boost research output and innovation, thereby enhancing productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The super-computer has been purchased and is set to improve research performance.
importance_rationale: The acquisition of the super-computer represents a significant investment in research infrastructure that can enhance Luxembourg's research capabilities and competitiveness.
description: Luxembourg has purchased a super-computer, MeluXina, to enhance its research capabilities in both industrial and academic sectors, promoting the adoption of cutting-edge technologies.
source_quote: A super-computer, MeluXina, has been purchased by the authorities and will be used to improve Luxembourg’s performance in research, both industrial and academic.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing public R&D funding is expected to stimulate private sector investment, enhancing overall innovation capacity and productivity.
status_evidence: The government announced plans to increase public spending on R&D.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in the government's approach to R&D funding, aiming to align public investment with private sector contributions, which is crucial for enhancing innovation.
description: Luxembourg plans to increase public spending on R&D to match private R&D funding, aiming to encourage greater investment by firms in research and development activities.
source_quote: Increase public spending on R&D to match private R&D funding and encourage greater investment by firms.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased public investment is expected to enhance infrastructure and innovation, leading to higher productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The government is committing over 4% of GDP annually to public investment.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural commitment to enhance public investment, which is crucial for supporting innovation and the green transition.
description: The government is committing over 4% of GDP annually to public investment, which will support infrastructure, the green transition, and innovation.
source_quote: Public investment of over 4% of GDP annually will continue to support infrastructure, the green transition, and innovation.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased R&D investment is expected to enhance productivity and innovation, leading to higher incomes and greater labor demand.
status_evidence: Luxembourg should increase investment in research and development (R&D) to support long-term productivity.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in policy aimed at reversing the trend of declining R&D investment, which is crucial for enhancing the country's innovation capacity and economic growth.
description: Luxembourg should increase investment in research and development (R&D) to support long-term productivity, particularly targeting laggard firms to stimulate technological diffusion and innovation.
source_quote: Investment spending, in particular on R&D, could be increased to support more innovation.

growth_orientation_rationale: Targeted funding can enhance firms' absorptive capacity and stimulate private R&D investment, leading to increased innovation.
status_evidence: The government plans to switch to better-targeted funding of innovation projects.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in how R&D funding is allocated, focusing on partnerships with the private sector to enhance innovation outcomes.
description: Luxembourg's government plans to switch to better-targeted funding of innovation projects in partnership with the private sector, aiming to optimize the outcomes of its R&D funding.
source_quote: Switching to better targeted funding of innovation projects in partnership with the private sector could optimise the outcomes of its funding.

growth_orientation_rationale: By fostering collaboration between research and industry, the programme enhances innovation capacity and supports economic growth.
status_evidence: The programme has been operational since 2010 and has supported numerous firms and research initiatives.
importance_rationale: The programme has a significant impact on applied research and innovation in key sectors, contributing to the overall economic development.
description: The Competence Centre Programme aims to promote applied research and frontier innovation in sectors aligned with the Smart Specialisation Strategy, fostering cooperation between the research sector and industry.
source_quote: The Competence Centre Programme aims to promote applied research and frontier innovation in sectors aligned with the Smart Specialisation Strategy.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the manufacturing sector, the policy is expected to create jobs and improve overall economic productivity.
status_evidence: The National Industrial Policy has been adopted as a reflection on the pre-crisis sources of growth.
importance_rationale: This policy represents a fundamental shift in Latvia's economic strategy, focusing on manufacturing as a key driver of growth and productivity.
description: The National Industrial Policy aims to diversify Latvia's economic growth sources by boosting the manufacturing sector's role and productivity.
source_quote: The stated policy goal is to increase the share of manufacturing in the economy from 14% in 2011 to 20% in 2020.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving vocational education and training enhances the skills of the workforce, which is essential for productivity growth and innovation in firms.
status_evidence: The network of VET schools was consolidated and upgraded as planned.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in vocational education, aiming to improve the quality of skills training and better align it with labor market needs.
description: The network of vocational education and training (VET) schools was consolidated in 2015, and 18 schools were upgraded to VET Competence Centres. This reform aims to enhance the quality and relevance of vocational training in Latvia.
source_quote: The network of vocational education and training (VET) schools was consolidated in 2015 and 18 schools were upgraded to VET Competence Centres.

growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating knowledge transfer and commercialization, the program aims to enhance innovation and competitiveness among SMEs.
status_evidence: The new Technology Transfer Program that supports the commercialization of public research was launched in 2016.
importance_rationale: The program is significant as it directly supports the commercialization of research, which is crucial for enhancing innovation in the economy.
description: The Technology Transfer Program was launched to support the commercialization of public research, including the Innovation Voucher that promotes knowledge transfer from research institutes to SMEs.
source_quote: The new Technology Transfer Program that supports the commercialization of public research was launched in 2016.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing adult education participation enhances the skill set of the workforce, which is essential for adapting to technological changes and improving productivity.
status_evidence: An action plan that establishes a governance framework and quality control of adult education was approved in 2016.
importance_rationale: This initiative is significant as it aims to improve the skills of the adult population, which is crucial for economic competitiveness, but it is not as transformative as structural reforms.
description: The government has set an ambitious target to increase adult education participation to 15% by 2020, supported by an action plan that includes governance frameworks and quality control.
source_quote: The government has set an ambitious target to have 15% of the adult population actively involved in education and training by 2020.

growth_orientation_rationale: Consolidating research institutes can enhance efficiency and focus resources on high-quality research, potentially leading to better research outcomes.
status_evidence: Research institutes have been consolidated through the allocation of funds following an external assessment of research quality.
importance_rationale: The consolidation of research institutes is a significant reform aimed at improving the efficiency and effectiveness of public research funding.
description: Research institutes have been consolidated through the allocation of funds following an external assessment of research quality, reducing the number of publicly financed research institutions.
source_quote: Research institutes have been consolidated through the allocation of funds following an external assessment of research quality.

growth_orientation_rationale: Evaluating tax incentives can enhance their effectiveness, potentially leading to increased R&D investment by young firms.
status_evidence: The evaluation of the R&D tax incentive is planned for 2017.
importance_rationale: The evaluation of tax incentives is significant as it aims to improve the effectiveness of existing policies, which can have a meaningful impact on R&D activities.
description: The evaluation of the newly reformed tax incentives for R&D is planned for 2017 to assess their effectiveness in reaching young firms.
source_quote: The evaluation of the newly reformed tax incentives for R&D, also in view to reaching young firms, is planned in 2017.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhances access to financing for small innovative firms, facilitating their investment and growth, which can lead to increased productivity and innovation.
status_evidence: Conditions for access to loans for small new businesses have been relaxed.
importance_rationale: The establishment of Altum and the relaxation of loan conditions represent significant steps in improving access to finance for startups, which is crucial for fostering innovation and economic growth.
description: The government established a single development financing institution, Altum, which offers a range of start-up and growth financing through public loans, credit guarantees, and microfinance measures. In 2018, conditions for access to loans for small new businesses were relaxed to broaden the scope of clients.
source_quote: The government established a single development financing institution Altum, offering a wide range of start-up and growth financing through public loans, credit guarantees, and microfinance measures.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing access to early-stage capital is essential for fostering innovation and supporting the growth of startups, which can lead to increased economic dynamism.
status_evidence: Recent policy action focused on developing pre-seed, seed and venture stage capital.
importance_rationale: The focus on early-stage capital development is a significant shift that addresses a critical gap in the financing landscape for startups, promoting innovation and economic growth.
description: Recent policy actions have focused on developing pre-seed, seed, and venture stage capital to support small innovative firms, as previous measures were dominated by later-stage growth financing. Plans to reduce administrative burdens for venture capital funds are also underway.
source_quote: Recent policy action focused on developing pre-seed, seed and venture stage capital, as previously available measures were dominated by later-stage growth financing.

growth_orientation_rationale: The removal of R&D tax incentives is likely to discourage private sector investment in R&D, leading to lower innovation activities and economic growth.
status_evidence: The R&D tax incentives were abolished as part of the corporate tax reform.
importance_rationale: The abolition of R&D tax incentives represents a significant structural change in Latvia's approach to supporting business innovation, which could have long-lasting effects on the innovation landscape.
description: Latvia has abolished its R&D tax incentives, which were previously introduced to encourage business R&D activities. This reform contrasts with the trend among OECD countries, where many have moved towards tax-based support measures for R&D.
source_quote: Latvia is among a minority of OECD countries that has not offered R&D tax incentives since the tax incentive for deductibility of R&D costs was abolished in 2018.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing financial incentives for R&D is expected to stimulate private sector investment in innovation, leading to increased productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The government has announced plans to improve the innovation system.
importance_rationale: This reform addresses a critical area of innovation policy by aiming to boost R&D spending, which is essential for enhancing Latvia's overall innovation capacity.
description: The government plans to improve the innovation system by enhancing the financial incentives for business R&D and evaluating the impact of the 2018 corporate tax reform, which treated R&D like any other investment.
source_quote: Improving the innovation system is equally important. The framework conditions for innovation are weak, with limited private-sector adoption of digital technologies.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving the business environment and managerial skills is expected to enhance productivity and innovation, leading to increased exports and economic growth.
status_evidence: Latvia should improve the business environment for all firms and the governance of state-owned enterprises.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to enhance the export capabilities of firms, which is crucial for Latvia's economic growth given its reliance on external markets.
description: Latvia aims to improve the business environment for firms by enhancing managerial skills, strengthening business networks, and concentrating export support on firms entering new markets.
source_quote: To promote export growth and diversification, Latvia should improve the business environment for all firms and the governance of state-owned enterprises.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing financial aid and flexibility in education is expected to enhance the skills and entrepreneurial capabilities of the workforce, fostering innovation.
status_evidence: Increasing financial aid for graduate students, giving schools more flexibility in setting wages.
importance_rationale: This plan is a significant step towards enhancing human capital, which is essential for fostering innovation and entrepreneurship in Latvia.
description: Latvia plans to increase financial aid for graduate students and provide schools with more flexibility in setting wages to boost the number of entrepreneurs and innovators.
source_quote: Increasing financial aid for graduate students, giving schools more flexibility in setting wages, exposing more students to advanced curricula.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing funding availability from institutional investors is expected to bolster the start-up ecosystem, leading to more innovation and job creation.
status_evidence: The government should examine approaches to make investment conditions more attractive to such investors.
importance_rationale: This initiative is significant as it aims to address a critical gap in the funding landscape for start-ups, although it is still in the exploratory phase.
description: The Latvian government is examining approaches to attract more institutional investors to the start-up sector, aiming to enhance funding conditions and support the growth of innovative firms.
source_quote: More institutional investor involvement in funding start-ups, as in the United States, could be one way to boost funding.

growth_orientation_rationale: By directing state-owned enterprises to invest in R&D, the initiative is expected to boost overall business innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: A new initiative is planned to communicate the direction of state-owned enterprises towards investment in R&D and innovation.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant shift in how state-owned enterprises are expected to contribute to innovation, potentially leading to increased R&D investment.
description: Latvia plans to implement a Shareholder’s Expectation Letter to guide state-owned enterprises towards increased investment in R&D and innovation, thereby enhancing their contribution to business innovation.
source_quote: Accordingly, a new initiative is planned – a Shareholder’s Expectation Letter – to clearly communicate the direction of state-owned enterprises towards investment in R&D and innovation.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing digital literacy and coding skills among students is expected to improve the future workforce's capabilities, thereby supporting innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The new curriculum aims to develop digital literacy as a transversal skill across all study areas.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in educational priorities, focusing on essential skills for the digital economy, which is crucial for Latvia's future competitiveness.
description: Latvia is reforming its national curriculum to prioritize computational thinking and digital literacy, aiming to teach coding from primary school to address the low share of young adults with programming skills.
source_quote: Latvia is currently reforming its national curriculum to give computational thinking higher priority.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing public support for R&D is expected to enhance innovation capacity in the private sector, leading to higher productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: Latvia should consider increasing the current level of support.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in the approach to funding R&D, aiming to enhance the overall innovation ecosystem in Latvia.
description: Latvia aims to increase public support for business R&D, including the potential introduction of refundable tax credits and greater reliance on public funding from European Structural Funds and the Recovery and Resilience Facility.
source_quote: Latvia should consider increasing the current level of support, along with steps to enhance the supply of researchers, and to rely more on indirect funding.

growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating technology transfer, this initiative is expected to enhance the commercialization of research outputs, thereby boosting innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: Latvia has set up a Single Technology Transfer Centre to foster industry-science cooperation.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant in enhancing the mechanisms for knowledge transfer, although it is part of a broader strategy to improve innovation.
description: Latvia has established a Single Technology Transfer Centre to enhance collaboration between industry and research institutions, promoting technology transfer and commercialization of research.
source_quote: Latvia has set up a Single Technology Transfer Centre to foster industry-science cooperation.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in human capital and addressing skilled labour shortages will enhance productivity and innovation capacity in firms.
status_evidence: The need to strengthen innovation and investment demand was highlighted as a key policy priority.
importance_rationale: This reform addresses systemic issues affecting innovation and investment, aiming for a comprehensive approach to enhance economic growth.
description: To strengthen innovation and investment demand of firms, it is crucial to lower informality, raise competition and business dynamism, and address skilled labour shortages by investing more in human capital and facilitating skilled migration.
source_quote: To strengthen innovation and investment demand of firms, it is crucial to lower informality, raise competition and business dynamism, and address skilled labour shortages.

growth_orientation_rationale: By lowering the financial barriers for SMEs to access capital markets, this programme can enhance their growth potential and encourage innovation.
status_evidence: The Ministry of Economy is planning a support programme to cover part of the costs of listing for SMEs.
importance_rationale: This support programme is a significant step towards facilitating SME access to capital markets, which is essential for their growth and innovation capacity.
description: The Ministry of Economy is planning a support programme to cover part of the costs of listing for SMEs on the Nasdaq Baltic stock exchange, aiming to reduce barriers for small firms.
source_quote: The Ministry of Economy is planning a support programme to cover part of the costs of listing for SMEs.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving health care access and efficiency contributes to a healthier workforce, which is vital for economic productivity.
status_evidence: The comprehensive health strategy has been in effect and is actively improving health care services.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a major overhaul of the health sector, aiming for systemic improvements in health care delivery.
description: The Mexican government outlined a comprehensive reform strategy for the health sector aimed at providing high-quality and cost-effective health care for the entire population, focusing on access, efficiency, and sustainability.
source_quote: The present administration has outlined a reform strategy in its Development Plan... The specific reform programme for the health sector provides more details.

growth_orientation_rationale: Encourages investment and job creation in the private sector, which can enhance productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The budget for 1996 included provisions for tax deductions.
importance_rationale: The reform provides significant support to SMEs, which are crucial for job creation and economic dynamism, but does not represent a fundamental overhaul of the system.
description: The 1996 Budget included tax deductions for small- and medium-sized enterprises that expand investment or create jobs, aiming to stimulate productive investment and employment growth.
source_quote: Tax deductions in favour of small- and medium-size enterprises, as well as for all enterprises that expand investment or create jobs in 1996 on a wider scale than in 1995.

growth_orientation_rationale: Supporting community projects and enterprise creation is expected to stimulate local economies and reduce migration pressures.
status_evidence: Both programmes have been successfully implemented as planned.
importance_rationale: While significant, these reforms are not structural changes but rather enhancements to existing community support initiatives.
description: The Mexican government has been promoting collective remittances through the 'Tres por uno' programme, which matches funds contributed by migrant groups with additional public finance to support community projects, and the 'My community' programme promotes the creation of enterprises co-financed by migrants and the state government in poor areas of Guanajuato, aiming to retain potential migrants.
source_quote: The first initiative was the 'Two for one' (Dos por uno) programme launched in Zacatecas in 1993, in which the state government added two additional dollars for every dollar brought by migrants groups; since 1996, the programme has become 'Three for one' (Tres por uno).

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhances collaboration between academia and industry, fostering innovation and improving the commercial viability of research.
status_evidence: The programme has supported 115 projects involving 71 firms and 60 universities and research centres.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the approach to R&D funding and collaboration, aiming to enhance innovation capacity across sectors.
description: The Mexican government has initiated a programme to deepen the links between R&D in universities and industry, providing funding for training and research projects as well as the commercialisation of successful research outcomes.
source_quote: Efforts are under way to increase cross-sector linkages; this is being done through an industry/university joint programme (sponsored by CONACYT).

growth_orientation_rationale: The expedited licensing process reduces barriers to entry for new businesses, fostering entrepreneurship and innovation.
status_evidence: The fast track licensing system is currently operational in Mexico City.
importance_rationale: The reform significantly improves the business environment but does not represent a structural change.
description: A fast track licensing system has been implemented in Mexico City to expedite the opening of new businesses, allowing them to commence operations within seven to 21 days.
source_quote: A ‘fast track’ licensing system has been implemented in Mexico City to allow the vast majority of new businesses to open within seven to 21 days.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investments in education and training are essential for building a skilled workforce that can drive innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The PRONAFIDE initiative has been actively promoting education and training programs since its implementation.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant commitment to enhancing human capital, which is foundational for long-term economic development.
description: The PRONAFIDE document emphasizes the importance of investing in education, training, and infrastructure to enhance labor efficiency and technological progress, which are crucial for sustainable economic growth.
source_quote: The programme offers a rather comprehensive policy framework... stresses the importance of investing in education, training, adequate nutrition and health care, as well as developing infrastructure.

growth_orientation_rationale: By streamlining procurement processes and reducing transaction costs, COMPRANET is expected to enhance public sector efficiency and accountability, ultimately supporting economic growth.
status_evidence: The system became fully operational at the end of 1999.
importance_rationale: The implementation of COMPRANET represents a significant improvement in public procurement practices, enhancing transparency and efficiency in government operations.
description: The Electronic System of Government Procurement (COMPRANET) was developed to enhance the efficiency and transparency of public sector tendering, allowing for electronic submission of bids and public access to procurement information.
source_quote: COMPRANET has been developed by SECODAM as a universal, public-access system for carrying out public sector tendering.

growth_orientation_rationale: By providing tax incentives and improving coordination, the law encourages private sector investment in R&D, which can lead to increased innovation and economic growth.
package_name: 1999 Scientific and Technological Research Enhancement Law
status_evidence: The law has been enacted and is in effect.
importance_rationale: This law represents a significant structural change in Mexico's approach to R&D, aiming to enhance collaboration between public and private sectors and stimulate investment in innovation.
description: The 1999 Law to Enhance Scientific and Technological Research aims to improve coordination of government R&D activities and enhance knowledge diffusion between public and private institutions, including provisions for tax incentives for private sector R&D investment.
source_quote: The 1999 Law to Enhance Scientific and Technological Research provides for better co-ordination of government R&D activities and establishes mechanisms to enhance the diffusion of knowledge between public and private institutions.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing the capacity of public research institutions to engage with the private sector can lead to increased innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The government has taken initiatives to foster investment in knowledge and strengthen the innovative capacity of the economy.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the governance of public research institutions, aimed at enhancing their role in the innovation ecosystem.
description: The Mexican government has initiated reforms to grant more financial autonomy to public research institutions, enabling them to develop research contracts with the business sector.
source_quote: The Mexican government is taking a number of initiatives to foster investment in knowledge and strengthen the innovative capacity of the economy.

growth_orientation_rationale: These measures aim to enhance access to financing and technological support, which are essential for the growth and productivity of small enterprises.
status_evidence: The specific programme for technological development in SMEs has been implemented, and COMPITE has been established and operational.
importance_rationale: The reforms represent significant but narrower changes aimed at supporting SMEs through financial and technological means.
description: The Mexican government has initiated measures to strengthen the microfinance sector, known as 'social banking', to improve access to financing for small enterprises, which are crucial for job creation and economic development. Additionally, initiatives have been launched to provide technological support to small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) to enhance their management skills and production practices, particularly through the use of information and communications technologies (ICT). The National Committee for Productivity and Technological Innovation (COMPITE) was established to provide targeted counselling for micro-firms and SMEs, helping them improve productivity through efficient manufacturing methods.
source_quote: The National Committee for Productivity and Technological Innovation (COMPITE) started up in 1997. It provides specifically targeted counselling for micro-firms and SMEs, aimed at helping them to apply more efficient manufacturing methods and so improve their productivity.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reforms aim to enhance educational quality and local governance, which can lead to improved human capital and productivity.
status_evidence: Both programs have been actively implemented to improve education and governance.
importance_rationale: These reforms represent significant but narrower changes aimed at improving education and governance.
description: The 'Escuelas de calidad' program was launched to improve the quality of basic education in poor socio-economic areas by providing competitive grants for school improvement and encouraging local decision-making. Additionally, the decentralisation process has led to the introduction of managerial innovations in some states to better suit local needs, including a modern budgetary and payment information system to reduce corruption and improve financial operations.
source_quote: Escuelas de calidad was launched in 2001 to improve the quality of basic education in poor socio-economic areas by giving competitive grants for improvement and encouraging local decision making.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in communication infrastructure is expected to enhance access to services and stimulate economic activity in underserved areas.
status_evidence: The project has been successfully implemented as planned.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a major investment in national infrastructure aimed at bridging the digital divide.
description: The e-Mexico project aims to eliminate the digital divide in Mexico by expanding communication infrastructure and providing government services to rural communities, with a commitment to spend 663 million pesos on various subprojects.
source_quote: To achieve the objectives of universal service and a greater coverage, a social fund to finance investment in infrastructure in poor areas was created in 2002.

growth_orientation_rationale: Simplifying business registration is expected to encourage entrepreneurship and stimulate economic activity.
status_evidence: The system has been successfully implemented as planned.
importance_rationale: While significant, this reform is an administrative improvement rather than a structural change.
description: Creation of SARE (Sistema de Apertura Rápida de Empresas), a new system to start a business within one day, aimed at simplifying the process of business registration.
source_quote: Creation of SARE (Sistema de Apertura Rápida de Empresas), a new system to start a business within one day.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving access to health services can enhance public health outcomes, which is essential for a productive workforce.
status_evidence: The Seguro Popular program has been successfully implemented to provide health care insurance.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in health care policy aimed at expanding coverage.
description: The implementation of the Seguro Popular program in 2004 aimed to provide health care insurance to all individuals, particularly targeting those without coverage, thus improving access to health services.
source_quote: The System for Social Protection in Health (SPSS) that came into effect in 2004 created a family insurance (Seguro Popular) to ensure that all individuals have access to health care insurance.

growth_orientation_rationale: The measures aim to improve the overall competitiveness of the economy, which can foster innovation and growth.
status_evidence: The project has been announced but not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: While the initiative is significant, it does not represent a major reform due to its limited scope.
description: The government project 'Concrete actions to enhance competitiveness' was announced in early 2005, providing a specific list of measures required to lift competitiveness in Mexico, although it falls short of addressing structural reforms needing constitutional changes.
source_quote: The government project 'Concrete actions to enhance competitiveness', announced in early 2005, provides a list of measures required to lift competitiveness.

growth_orientation_rationale: These initiatives aim to improve the skills and capabilities of the workforce, which is essential for fostering innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: All initiatives have been launched and are currently operational.
importance_rationale: While these initiatives are significant, they are more focused and do not represent a systemic change.
description: Several initiatives were launched to enhance human capital for innovation, including a programme to lower the cost of first employment for young workers, the establishment of the National Council of Education for Life and Work (CONEVyT) to oversee adult learning policies, and the expansion of training support programmes for SMEs to improve their technological capabilities.
source_quote: The Programme for Training and Strengthening SME capabilities aims at upgrading entrepreneurial competences in management, administration and marketing to allow a wider and deeper absorption of new technologies.

growth_orientation_rationale: This programme is expected to facilitate trade and logistics, thereby supporting the growth of innovative firms involved in cross-border activities.
status_evidence: The pilot programme was agreed upon but has not yet been fully implemented.
importance_rationale: The agreement represents a significant policy change in cross-border trade and logistics.
description: In February 2007, Mexico and the United States agreed to launch a pilot programme allowing trucks from both countries to cross the border, involving 100 companies that meet safety and licensing standards.
source_quote: An important step forward was made in February 2007, with Mexico and the United States agreeing to launch a pilot programme to allow trucks from both countries to cross the border.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing teacher quality and school infrastructure, the initiative is expected to improve educational outcomes, which can lead to higher productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The initiative was officially announced and has been in effect since 2008.
importance_rationale: The Alianza represents a comprehensive approach to reforming the education system, addressing multiple weaknesses and aiming for systemic change in teacher quality and school performance.
description: The Alianza for Quality Education aims to improve the quality of education in Mexico through various initiatives, including school modernization, teacher professionalization, and curriculum reform.
source_quote: In May 2008 President Calderón announced a voluntary agreement between the government and the 1.5 million member teachers’ union to improve the quality of education in Mexico.

growth_orientation_rationale: The establishment of the network is intended to enhance collaboration and innovation in the aerospace sector, contributing to economic growth.
status_evidence: The network was established in 2008 and has been operational since.
importance_rationale: The network represents a significant initiative to enhance innovation in a specific sector but is not a major reform.
description: The Aerospace Research and Innovation Network of Querétaro (RIIAQ) was established in 2008 to strengthen research, technological development, and innovation capabilities in the aerospace sector.
source_quote: Key to Querétaro’s success has been the close relationship between the state government and private industry. An important co-ordination mechanism between the industry, education and research institutions is the Aerospace Research and Innovation Network of Querétaro (RIIAQ).

growth_orientation_rationale: Simplifying regulations can enhance productivity and facilitate technology absorption, which supports innovation.
status_evidence: The regulatory review has been initiated and is in force.
importance_rationale: The 'Base Cero' initiative represents a structural change aimed at improving the regulatory environment for innovation.
description: The regulatory review 'Base Cero' was initiated to update federal regulations, aiming to simplify processes and enhance productivity while facilitating technology absorption to strengthen innovation.
source_quote: The objective is to improve and simplify regulations to favour productivity and facilitate technology absorption, so as to strengthen innovation as a basis of economic growth.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reform is expected to stimulate private investment and improve infrastructure, which can lead to increased economic activity and growth.
status_evidence: The PPP Law has been successfully adopted and is currently in force.
importance_rationale: The PPP Law represents a major reform in how infrastructure projects are financed and executed in Mexico.
description: The adoption of the PPP Law in 2012 enhances private investment through public-private partnerships, aiming to improve infrastructure financing and efficiency.
source_quote: The adoption of the PPP Law in 2012 is another step towards enhancing private investment through public-private partnerships.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reform is designed to enhance the labour market, which can lead to increased innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: The labour reform law was enacted and has been in effect since late 2012.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the labour market aimed at fostering innovation.
description: In late 2012, Mexico introduced a comprehensive labour reform law aimed at stimulating the creation of formal employment through innovative measures such as short-term training contracts and limitations on back-pay during litigation.
source_quote: The comprehensive labour reform law of late 2012 contained initiatives intended to stimulate the creation of formal employment.

growth_orientation_rationale: These initiatives are designed to foster innovation and economic growth by supporting startups and enhancing linkages with research institutions.
status_evidence: The National Institute of the Entrepreneur was established in 2013 and has been operational since.
importance_rationale: The reforms significantly enhance the support structure for startups but do not represent a complete overhaul of the system.
description: Mexico aims to enhance its startup ecosystem by promoting high-tech industrial clusters that establish linkages with universities and early-stage investment vehicles, alongside introducing targeted policy tools to support innovative firms and the creation of the National Institute of the Entrepreneur, which implements schemes to address entrepreneurs' needs, including a seed capital 'fund of funds' for startups.
source_quote: A National Institute of the Entrepreneur was created in 2013 to refine and implement schemes to address entrepreneurs’ needs, including forming a seed capital 'fund of funds'.

growth_orientation_rationale: The increase in funding is aimed at enhancing innovation capabilities and collaboration, which can drive economic growth.
status_evidence: The funding increase was executed in 2014 and has been in effect since.
importance_rationale: The funding increase is significant but does not represent a complete overhaul of the funding system.
description: In 2014, Mexico's National Council for Science and Technology (CONACYT) increased its funding by 20%, focusing on transversal innovation policies to enhance development in high-impact industry sectors and improve cooperation with universities.
source_quote: The funding available to the National Council for Science and Technology (CONACYT) was increased by 20% in 2014.

growth_orientation_rationale: The tax credit is designed to stimulate private sector investment in R&D, which can lead to increased innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The tax credit has been enacted and is currently in effect for qualifying firms.
importance_rationale: While significant, the tax credit is a narrower reform compared to broader R&D funding initiatives.
description: A tax credit on R&D was approved by Congress, allowing firms to offset 30% of their qualifying R&D expenditures against income tax, aimed at incentivizing private sector investment in innovation.
source_quote: A tax credit on R&D will start in 2017, which will allow participating firms a 30% tax credit on their R&D expenditures.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing R&D funding is expected to enhance innovation capacity and productivity in the long run.
status_evidence: The government has announced its intention to double R&D spending.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a major commitment to enhancing R&D funding in Mexico.
description: The Mexican government aims to double spending on R&D to about 1% of GDP, reflecting a commitment to enhance research and innovation capacity.
source_quote: There are other announced policy priorities which would imply additional spending, for instance for investment in R&D (where the objective is to double spending on R&D to about 1% of GDP).

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing R&D funding is expected to enhance innovation and productivity, contributing positively to economic growth.
status_evidence: The reform has been put into action as part of the government's commitment to enhance R&D.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a structural change in R&D funding policy.
description: The Mexican government has initiated a significant reform aimed at boosting R&D and infrastructure, with plans to double R&D spending from 0.54% of GDP to 1%. This initiative is designed to enhance the country's innovative potential and competitiveness in global value chains.
source_quote: Raising R&D intensity further is one of the priorities of the current administration, which intends to double R&D spending from the current 0.54% of GDP to 1%.

growth_orientation_rationale: Providing internships and training scholarships is expected to enhance the skills of young people, contributing to a more skilled workforce.
status_evidence: The programme is currently operational and providing internships.
importance_rationale: While the programme is significant, it is not as transformative as major reforms.
description: The 'Youths Building the Future' programme aims to strengthen human capital by providing internships for young people aged 18-29 who are not working or studying, along with a training scholarship to enhance their skills.
source_quote: The programme 'Youths Building the Future' seeks to strengthen human capital accumulation by providing internships for 18-29 year olds not working or studying.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing financial inclusion and access to banking services is expected to support entrepreneurship and innovation.
package_name: Banking Sector Reforms for Financial Inclusion
status_evidence: The reforms have been officially announced but are not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: The reforms represent a significant overhaul of the banking sector aimed at increasing access and inclusion.
description: In January 2019, the government announced a package of reforms aimed at deepening the banking sector and increasing financial inclusion, which includes the development of a smartphone platform for cost-free electronic payments and allowing minors to open bank accounts.
source_quote: In January 2019 the government announced a package of reforms to deepen the banking sector and stock market and increase financial inclusion.

growth_orientation_rationale: These initiatives aim to enhance access to financial services, which can stimulate economic activity and improve quality of life in underserved areas.
status_evidence: The initiatives have been launched and are currently operational.
importance_rationale: While these initiatives are significant, they do not represent a structural overhaul of the financial system.
description: Mexico has launched initiatives aimed at improving financial inclusion in marginalized communities, including the creation of the Banco Bienestar to provide access to financial services in remote areas and the Central Bank's platform Cobro Digital (CoDi) to facilitate digital payments, although the latter has faced limited adoption due to communication issues.
source_quote: Sembrando Vida aims at improving the quality of life of people in marginalized rural communities and promoting sustainable development.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reform aims to improve living conditions and access to housing, which can enhance overall productivity and social mobility.
status_evidence: The new housing policy has been put into effect to facilitate access to adequate housing.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in housing policy, targeting low-income households and aiming to improve urban living conditions, which is crucial for social equity and economic development.
description: Mexico's government has reformed its national housing policy to enhance access to adequate housing for all citizens, focusing on low-income households and improving policy coordination.
source_quote: The government recently reformed the national housing policy and its governance to facilitate access to adequate housing to all Mexicans.

growth_orientation_rationale: The taxonomy encourages investment in sustainable activities, potentially leading to increased capital flows towards environmentally and socially responsible projects.
status_evidence: The taxonomy has been launched and is operational.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in how sustainable finance is defined and regulated, with potential long-term impacts on investment patterns and economic growth.
description: Mexico has launched the first taxonomy in the world that covers both environmental and social objectives, providing transparent definitions of sustainable activities for financial players and companies.
source_quote: Mexico has launched the first world taxonomy that covers both environmental and social activities to provide transparent and consistent definitions to investors.

growth_orientation_rationale: By improving SMEs' access to resources and markets, the initiative is expected to enhance productivity and competitiveness, contributing positively to economic growth.
status_evidence: The policy package has been publicly announced to support SMEs.
importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant effort to enhance the capabilities of SMEs, which are crucial for the economy, but it is not a structural overhaul.
description: A new policy package named 'Mano a mano' has been launched to support SMEs' institutional, digital, and financial inclusion, aiming to enhance their participation in international trade.
source_quote: A new policy package has been launched (Mano a mano, in Spanish) to support SMEs’ institutional, digital and financial inclusion.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing SMEs' capabilities to supply larger firms, the programme is expected to increase their productivity and integration into global value chains.
status_evidence: The programme has been publicly announced to support SMEs in becoming suppliers.
importance_rationale: The programme is a significant initiative to enhance SME capabilities but does not represent a fundamental change in policy.
description: Mexico has implemented a four-stage programme to facilitate SMEs becoming local suppliers for foreign direct investment firms, including training and matching processes.
source_quote: Mexico has put in place a four-stage programme to facilitate SMEs becoming local suppliers of companies growing in Mexico or relocating there.
