status_evidence: The economic commitments are due to start in 2001.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change aimed at aligning Turkey's financial sector with EU standards, which is crucial for its accession process.
description: Turkey's Accession Partnership outlines commitments to implement a disinflation and structural reform programme, which includes enhancing transparency and surveillance in the financial sector.
source_quote: The economic commitments... are due to start in 2001 and to be eventually completed over the medium term.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reforms aim to enhance R&D capabilities and support local technological development, which are expected to boost productivity and innovation.
status_evidence: The SME Strategy was approved and the subsidy schemes were initiated as part of the government's efforts to enhance R&D.
importance_rationale: The reforms represent significant structural changes aimed at enhancing the R&D landscape and supporting SMEs.
description: The Turkish government approved an SME Strategy in November 2003, which includes a short-term Action Plan for 2004-2006 aimed at strengthening research and development infrastructure and promoting local technological clusters. Additionally, several schemes subsidise target research-development, training, and technology acquisition costs at very high rates of 70-90%, although the programme budgets are restricted to a small number of beneficiaries, raising competition issues.
source_quote: Several schemes subsidise target (eligible) research-development, training, technology acquisition etc. costs at very high rates of 70-90 per cent.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving education quality and equipping schools with new technologies is expected to enhance the skills of the workforce, thereby supporting innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: The review and modernization efforts have been officially initiated and are in progress.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of the education system, which is crucial for building human capital.
description: The Turkish government has initiated a critical review of the public education system, focusing on modernizing curricula, increasing teacher quality, and equipping schools with new technologies.
source_quote: The Ministry of Education declared in summer 2004 that a critical review is focusing on six main areas: i) Increasing effective enrollment rates; ii) modernizing the curricula; iii) increasing the quality of teachers; iv) equipping schools with new technologies.

growth_orientation_rationale: Decentralizing responsibilities and enhancing accountability can lead to more efficient public service delivery, indirectly supporting innovation.
status_evidence: The law has been passed and is in effect.
importance_rationale: This law represents a significant structural change in public administration.
description: The Public Administration Framework Law was passed by Parliament in June 2004, aiming to transform public administration in Turkey by decentralizing responsibilities and enhancing accountability in service delivery.
source_quote: The Public Administration Framework Law was passed by Parliament in June 2004.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing transparency and efficiency in public spending is expected to improve resource allocation for innovation and R&D.
status_evidence: The law has been passed and is awaiting implementation.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in how public finances are managed, impacting various sectors including innovation.
description: The Public Financial Management and Control Law mandates the introduction of multi-year functional budgeting, which aims to enhance transparency and efficiency in public spending by aligning budgets with strategic objectives and performance indicators.
source_quote: The Public Financial Management and Control Law prescribes the introduction of functional budgeting in all areas of public spending.

growth_orientation_rationale: Lowering VAT is expected to enhance competitiveness and support the textile sector's growth.
status_evidence: The VAT reduction has been enacted and is currently in effect.
importance_rationale: While significant, the VAT reduction is a targeted measure rather than a broad reform.
description: The Turkish government reduced the value-added tax (VAT) rate on textile products from 18% to 8% to support the textile sector facing competition from low-cost countries.
source_quote: The government reduced the value-added tax (VAT) rate on textile products from the standard 18% to a preferential 8%, starting from March 2006.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reform aims to enhance agricultural productivity and sustainability through direct support mechanisms.
status_evidence: The Agricultural Law has been enacted and is currently in effect.
importance_rationale: The transformation of the strategy into law represents a significant policy shift in agricultural support.
description: An 'Agricultural Strategy' was adopted and transformed into an 'Agricultural Law' in 2006, emphasizing direct income support as the primary instrument while allowing for deficiency payments to maintain national production capacity.
source_quote: Starting from the understanding that accelerating diversification into new products, improving quality and enhancing productivity require a more pro-active approach, an 'Agricultural Strategy' was adopted by the government and transformed into an 'Agricultural Law' in 2006.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing skills and reducing tax burdens can improve productivity and employment outcomes.
status_evidence: The Employment Package was launched and KOSGEB's programmes are in effect.
importance_rationale: The measures are significant but do not represent a structural overhaul.
description: The government has launched an Employment Package in May 2008 that includes significant measures aimed at reducing labour tax wedges and promoting national employment services to enhance the skills of the labour force. Additionally, the Agency for the Development of Small-and-Medium Sized Enterprises (KOSGEB) will enhance its managerial and technical up-skilling programmes to support SMEs, subsidising up to 90% of eligible costs for training.
source_quote: An Employment Package enacted in May 2008 entailed significant measures for reducing labour tax wedges and promoting national employment services emphasising the upgrading of the skills of the labour force.

growth_orientation_rationale: Tax incentives for R&D are expected to stimulate private sector investment in innovation.
status_evidence: The R&D Law was enacted and is currently in effect.
importance_rationale: The enactment of a law represents a significant policy change in R&D funding.
description: The Turkish government enacted a Research and Development Law in March 2008, providing additional incentives for R&D, including tax deductions for R&D expenses and exemptions for R&D personnel.
source_quote: A Research and Development Law was enacted in March 2008 providing additional incentives for R&D including the deduction of R&D expenses from the corporate income tax base.

growth_orientation_rationale: The establishment of Technopoles is expected to enhance R&D capabilities and foster innovation through collaboration between universities and industry.
status_evidence: The Technopoles have been established and are operational.
importance_rationale: The creation of Technopoles represents a significant investment in research infrastructure.
description: Twelve Technology Development Zones (Technopoles) have been established around large universities, offering various tax exemptions and infrastructure support to promote R&D and software production.
source_quote: Twelve Technology Development Zones (Technopoles) have been created around large universities.

growth_orientation_rationale: Providing infrastructure and services to SMEs is expected to enhance their growth and competitiveness.
status_evidence: The plans for mobilising OSBs and KSSs are in effect.
importance_rationale: The initiative is significant but does not represent a major structural change.
description: The government plans to mobilise Organised Industrial Zones (OSBs) and Small Industrial Sites (KSSs) to support the growth of medium-sized enterprises and small firms by providing low-cost infrastructure and sector-specific services.
source_quote: The government plans to mobilise the Organised Industrial Zones (OSBs) and Small Industrial Sites (KSSs) more actively in the future.

growth_orientation_rationale: Shifting resources to the formal sector is expected to improve productivity and tax collection.
status_evidence: The government has announced plans for formalisation and regional investment.
importance_rationale: The initiatives are significant but do not represent a major overhaul.
description: The government aims to overcome the duality between formal and informal sectors by accelerating the shift of resources to the formal sector, which is essential for enhancing productivity and competitive performance. This includes a new investment package for the GAP region to accelerate public projects and a 'formalisation strategy' aimed at transitioning informal firms to the formal sector.
source_quote: The package includes additional central government budget financing over the 2008-12 period so as to accelerate the completion of public projects and the development of the region.

growth_orientation_rationale: By fostering cooperation between universities and the private sector, the reform is expected to enhance innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: The establishment of TDZs and technology centres represents a significant structural change in the innovation landscape.
description: The Turkish government is enhancing technological catching-up by supporting private R&D through the introduction of technology development zones (TDZs) and technology centres, promoting cooperation between universities and industry. A total of 36 TDZs and 20 technology centres are planned to facilitate this collaboration.
source_quote: Recent government incentives to enhance technological catching-up by supporting private R&D, technology transfer centres and co-operation between universities and private sector are welcome.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reform is expected to enhance investment, which can lead to increased productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The investment incentive package was legislated and is currently in force.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant structural change in the investment landscape of Turkey.
description: In June 2012, Turkey implemented a new investment incentive package designed to stimulate both domestic and foreign investment, particularly in sectors with high imported input dependence. This package includes generous incentives for long-term private savings and aims to enhance existing investment incentives, fostering growth in the business sector and potentially increasing exports or reducing imports.
source_quote: Another major structural initiative is the introduction of a new investment incentive system, extending the existing one and making it more generous.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving educational attainment is expected to enhance the skill level of the workforce, contributing to long-term economic growth.
status_evidence: The extension of compulsory education was legislated and is currently in force.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a major overhaul of the education system in Turkey.
description: Turkey's education policy underwent a significant reform in April 2012 with the extension of compulsory education to 12 years, aimed at improving educational attainment and quality across the country.
source_quote: The extension of compulsory education to 12 years legislated in April 2012 will entail an increase in the average duration of schooling.

growth_orientation_rationale: Simplifying regulatory requirements is expected to facilitate the establishment and growth of small enterprises, contributing to economic dynamism.
status_evidence: The establishment of the registration facility is currently in the planning stages.
importance_rationale: The reform is significant for improving the business environment but does not represent a major overhaul.
description: A new central registration facility is being established to streamline the online company establishment and registration process, along with improved information sharing between government agencies to simplify regulatory requirements for small enterprises.
source_quote: A new central registration facility is being built up for online company establishment/registration and information sharing between government agencies.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing R&D spending is expected to enhance innovation capacity and productivity in the economy.
status_evidence: The reform has been successfully implemented as planned.
importance_rationale: The goal to significantly increase R&D spending represents a major reform in public funding for research.
description: The Turkish government set a goal to increase R&D spending from 0.76% of GDP in 2006 to 2% of GDP by 2013, emphasizing the importance of quality in R&D spending.
source_quote: The government goal of increasing R&D spending from 0.76% of GDP in 2006 to 2% of GDP in 2013 is a welcome objective.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reforms aim to stimulate entrepreneurship and innovation, which are critical for economic growth.
status_evidence: The tax incentives and the Teknogirişim programme are currently in effect, supporting startups in Turkey.
importance_rationale: The introduction of significant tax incentives and a dedicated programme for startups represents a structural change in the support for the entrepreneurial ecosystem.
description: The Teknogirişim (TechnoEntrepreneurship) programme was proposed by the Ministry of Science, Industry and Technology to support the development of technology-based startups and enhance entrepreneurship in Turkey. Additionally, tax incentives for business angels and venture capitalists have been introduced to facilitate financing for innovative investments in small firms.
source_quote: To facilitate the financing of innovative investments in small firms, tax incentives have been offered to business angels and venture capitalists.

growth_orientation_rationale: Stimulating equity capital demand is expected to enhance investment and innovation among SMEs.
status_evidence: The tax allowance has been in effect since its introduction in 2015.
importance_rationale: While beneficial, this reform is a targeted adjustment rather than a major overhaul.
description: Turkey has introduced a tax allowance for newly issued corporate equity, aimed at reducing the reliance on debt for financing investments, expected to stimulate equity capital demand, particularly among SMEs.
source_quote: Turkey has addressed the debt-bias of the corporate tax system by introducing an allowance for newly issued corporate equity in 2015.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing the effectiveness of R&D funding can lead to increased innovation and productivity in the economy.
component_name: Publicly-funded R&D and design centers reform
status_evidence: The government stated its commitment to implement the planned measures.
importance_rationale: The reform aims to improve the effectiveness of existing R&D funding mechanisms, which is significant for enhancing innovation capacity.
description: The new government declared its commitment to implement the reforms outlined in the 2016 Action Plan, which includes measures to improve the effectiveness of publicly-funded R&D and design centers.
source_quote: The new government declared its continuing commitment to the reforms enshrined in the 2016 Action Plan.

growth_orientation_rationale: By funding targeted R&D projects, the programme aims to enhance innovation capacity in key sectors, potentially leading to increased productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The programme was launched to support R&D in priority areas.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant effort to direct public funding towards specific R&D areas, which can enhance innovation and competitiveness in those sectors.
description: The Scientific and Technological Research Council of Turkey (TÜBITAK) launched the Support Programme for Research, Technological Development and Innovation Projects in Priority Areas (TÜBİTAK-1003) to stimulate targeted R&D projects in specific sectors with strong capacity.
source_quote: The TÜBİTAK-1003 programme seeks to stimulate target-oriented, concrete R&D projects in specific areas with strong R&D capacity.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving the understanding of R&D and innovation policies can lead to better-targeted support, enhancing overall productivity and innovation.
status_evidence: The implementation of the state aid monitoring system is planned for the end of 2016.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant step towards improving the evaluation of R&D and innovation policies, which is crucial for effective policy-making.
description: Turkey plans to implement a state aid monitoring system by the end of 2016 to enhance the understanding of the impact of R&D and innovation policies, with regular publication of evaluation studies.
source_quote: Together with the planned implementation of the state aid monitoring system from end-2016, it is expected to enhance the understanding of the impact of R&D and innovation policies.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improved intellectual property protection encourages innovation and investment by providing firms with better security for their inventions.
status_evidence: A new Law on Industrial Property Rights entered into force in 2017.
importance_rationale: This law represents a comprehensive overhaul of the intellectual property framework, which is essential for fostering innovation and protecting creators' rights.
description: Turkey adopted a new law on Industrial Property Rights to enhance intellectual property protection, which includes specific chapters on patents and trademarks.
source_quote: A new Law on Industrial Property Rights entered into force in 2017, replacing all existing decree laws in this area with a single compact law.

growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing administrative burdens, the reform is expected to enhance the business environment, thereby encouraging investment and innovation.
status_evidence: The omnibus bill was put into force to improve business procedures.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change aimed at improving the overall investment climate, which is crucial for fostering innovation and economic growth.
description: The Coordination Council for Improvement of the Investment Environment implemented an omnibus bill (Law No.7099 of March 2018) to ease procedures and reduce costs in major business areas, including property registration.
source_quote: The Coordination Council for Improvement of the Investment Environment (YOIKK) put in force an omnibus bill (Law No.7099 of March 2018) to further ease procedures and reduce costs in all major doing business areas.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in R&D and human capital is expected to enhance productivity and innovation in the agricultural sector and among SMEs.
package_name: Agricultural Innovation and Human Capital Development
status_evidence: The reforms have been put into action as part of the government's strategy.
importance_rationale: The reforms involve significant but narrower changes aimed at enhancing R&D funding and human capital.
description: The Turkish government is directing funds to finance R&D and modern infrastructure to enhance productivity in the agricultural sector, while also streamlining and targeting resources for innovation to enhance qualified personnel among SMEs as part of broader educational reforms.
source_quote: Funds should be increasingly directed to finance R&D and modern infrastructure to boost productivity.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing the business support system is expected to stimulate innovation and investment, contributing to economic growth.
status_evidence: The plan has been implemented as part of Turkey's strategic initiatives.
importance_rationale: This plan represents a significant structural change in the approach to business support and innovation.
description: Turkey's National Development Plan for 2019-2023 aims to enhance the business support system by promoting innovation, easing access to finance, and providing incentives for investments in specific regions and sectors.
source_quote: The support system aims at, inter alia, promoting exports and internationalisation, fostering innovation and easing access to finance for firms of all sizes.

growth_orientation_rationale: Evaluating labor market prospects enhances the alignment of education with market needs, supporting economic growth.
status_evidence: The project has been successfully implemented to evaluate labor market prospects.
importance_rationale: The project is significant in improving educational outcomes but does not represent a major systemic change.
description: The UNI-VERI project was initiated to evaluate the labor market prospects of tertiary degree programs, providing a digital platform for comparing various higher education programs based on employment outcomes.
source_quote: The UNI-VERI project was started in 2019 by the Human Resources Office of the Presidency.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing digital skills in education is expected to build a skilled workforce capable of supporting innovation and cybersecurity.
status_evidence: The strategy has been implemented as part of Turkey's educational reforms.
importance_rationale: This strategy represents a significant investment in human capital for innovation.
description: Turkey's National Cyber Security Strategy and Action Plan aims to enhance digital skills in education by integrating cybersecurity content into school curricula and increasing the number of graduates in related programs.
source_quote: The National Cyber Security Strategy and Action Plan includes strategic goals to increase basic and advanced digital skills.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing the business environment and digital skills is expected to stimulate innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The program has been implemented as part of Turkey's strategic initiatives.
importance_rationale: This program represents a significant initiative to transform the business landscape in Turkey.
description: The 'New Economy Programme 2021-2023' aims to address shortcomings in Turkey's business environment, enhance digital skills, and foster e-trade, while also attracting foreign direct investment and improving environmental sustainability.
source_quote: The New Economy Programme aimed at addressing a number of shortcomings in the business environment, in the entrepreneurial eco-system, in Turkey’s digital skills and in the flexibility of the labour market.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased government funding for R&D is expected to enhance innovation capacity and productivity in the economy.
status_evidence: Overall government support for R&D has increased significantly.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a structural change in the funding landscape for R&D in Türkiye, aiming to boost innovation and competitiveness.
description: The Turkish government has significantly increased its support for R&D, raising funding from 0.03% of GDP in 2006 to almost 0.23% in 2021, aligning with the OECD average. This includes direct funds, tax incentives, and assistance through public procurement, aimed at enhancing the country's research capabilities.
source_quote: Overall government support for R&D has increased from 0.03% of GDP in 2006 to almost 0.23% in 2021, around the OECD average.

growth_orientation_rationale: Attracting skilled workers can enhance innovation capacity and technological advancement in the economy.
status_evidence: The 'Turquoise Card' has been introduced to attract highly skilled migrants.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant for enhancing the talent pool in Türkiye, which is crucial for driving innovation and economic growth.
description: Türkiye introduced the 'Turquoise Card' as a work permit for highly skilled foreign workers, aiming to attract talent and support innovation in key sectors.
source_quote: The authorities introduced the 'Turquoise Card' as an alternative to annually renewing residence permits.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing digital capabilities is expected to improve competitiveness and innovation among SMEs.
status_evidence: The strategy has been officially announced but not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: This strategy is significant but is part of a broader initiative rather than a standalone major reform.
description: The Turkish government has initiated a 'Digitalisation Strategy' as part of its 2023 Industry and Technology Strategy, aimed at enhancing the digital capabilities of SMEs, including support mechanisms to measure and improve companies' readiness for digitalisation.
source_quote: The 'Digitalisation Strategy' will include solutions and support mechanisms for enterprises of all sizes.

growth_orientation_rationale: Providing grant funding to encourage innovation is expected to stimulate economic growth and technological advancement.
status_evidence: The government has implemented various programmes to provide grant funding.
importance_rationale: The introduction of various funding programmes is significant but does not represent a major systemic change.
description: Türkiye has introduced various government programmes that provide grant-funding to the academic sector, companies, and state research labs to encourage innovation, with a focus on high-technology projects.
source_quote: Various government programmes encourage innovation by providing grant-funding to the academic sector, companies and the state's research and development labs.

growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitates the flow of knowledge and technology from research institutions to the market, enhancing innovation capacity.
status_evidence: The plan to expand technology transfer offices was officially announced.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant step towards improving collaboration between research and industry, which is crucial for enhancing innovation.
description: Türkiye plans to expand technology transfer offices to enhance collaboration between academia and industry, complemented by digital platforms for matchmaking.
source_quote: Expand technology transfer offices in Türkiye and complement them by digital platforms that promote and facilitate matchmaking between academic and industry partners.

growth_orientation_rationale: A unified framework will enhance the effectiveness of public R&D funding by identifying best practices and challenges.
status_evidence: The initiative to develop a unified evaluation framework was officially announced.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it aims to improve the assessment of public R&D investments, which is crucial for effective policy-making.
description: The government aims to develop a unified evaluation framework for public R&D support to improve the assessment of its social and economic impacts.
source_quote: Develop a common and unified evaluation framework for public R&D support to identify best practices and challenges.

growth_orientation_rationale: This regulation encourages industries to adopt cleaner technologies, which can enhance productivity and reduce environmental costs.
status_evidence: The regulation was introduced in January 2025.
importance_rationale: The regulation represents a significant step towards improving industrial emissions management, with potential long-term benefits for environmental sustainability and public health.
description: Türkiye introduced the Regulation on the Management of Industrial Emissions, which includes a Green Transformation Certificate to assess the environmental performance of industrial facilities, promoting compliance with best practices.
source_quote: Türkiye introduced the Regulation on the Management of Industrial Emissions in January 2025, which includes a Green Transformation Certificate.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving collaboration between research and business is expected to enhance technology adoption, thereby increasing productivity and innovation in the economy.
status_evidence: The strategy to enhance research-business collaborations has been publicly announced.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift towards integrating research with business practices, which is crucial for enhancing innovation capacity and competitiveness in the Turkish economy.
description: Türkiye aims to enhance its innovation system by promoting better research-business collaborations and improving the diffusion of new technologies among firms. This includes financial support for research-business collaboration and performance contracts in higher education institutions.
source_quote: More needs to be done to promote links between research activities and broader technology adoption.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased funding for R&D is expected to stimulate innovation, improve productivity, and support economic growth.
status_evidence: The government announced intentions to double project funding for R&D and innovation by 2030.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant commitment to enhancing the R&D landscape in Türkiye, which is crucial for long-term economic development and competitiveness.
description: Türkiye plans to double project funding for R&D and innovation by 2030 compared to 2020 levels, aiming to enhance research capabilities and foster innovation across various sectors.
source_quote: Double project funding for R&D and innovation by 2030 compared to 2020 levels.

growth_orientation_rationale: The establishment of an unemployment insurance system and the need for improved educational expenditure are both aimed at enhancing the workforce's skills and stability, which supports innovation capacity.
status_evidence: Both reforms are currently in the announcement phase.
importance_rationale: While these reforms are significant in addressing workforce stability and skills, they do not represent a structural overhaul of the innovation system.
description: Turkey is planning to set up an unemployment insurance system aimed at providing limited compensation for a limited period, which is intended to be largely self-financing with minimal public support. Additionally, Turkey's educational expenditure has declined as a percentage of GDP, raising concerns about the need for improved skills and competences to enhance innovation capacity.
source_quote: The financial resources devoted to the sector seem inadequate, especially in view of recent and planned increases in enrolment rates.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased R&D funding is expected to lead to higher innovation levels, which can enhance productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The government intends to invest more in R&D to improve innovation.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in Turkey's approach to R&D funding, aiming to align with OECD standards and stimulate economic growth through innovation.
description: Turkey aims to enhance its science and technology capabilities by increasing public funding for R&D, which is currently low compared to OECD averages. This initiative is intended to stimulate innovation and improve university-industry linkages, thereby fostering economic growth.
source_quote: If Turkey wishes to upgrade its product specialisation and raise multi-factor productivity, both business and government will need to invest more in innovation and R&D.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in education and skills enhances human capital, which is essential for innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The need to increase spending for human development has been a consistent message of past OECD Surveys.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant shift in policy focus towards human capital development, which is crucial for Turkey's long-term economic growth and competitiveness.
description: Turkey has recognized the need to increase spending on education, skills development, and technology to foster faster growth and improve living standards, particularly in light of its younger population and potential for economic catch-up.
source_quote: The need to increase spending for human development has been a consistent message of past OECD Surveys.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased R&D investment is essential for innovation, product development, and improving productivity, which supports economic growth.
status_evidence: The R&D intensity of business is also quite low in Turkey in general.
importance_rationale: This reform highlights a critical need for structural change in Turkey's approach to R&D, which is vital for enhancing innovation capacity and economic development.
description: Turkey's government has acknowledged the low R&D intensity in business and the necessity for both business and government to invest more in R&D to upgrade the production base and transition towards a high-tech economy.
source_quote: The R&D intensity of business is also quite low in Turkey in general.

growth_orientation_rationale: Eliminating discriminatory practices and streamlining procedures is expected to attract foreign investment, fostering innovation.
status_evidence: The bill has been presented to Parliament but not yet passed.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a structural change in the approach to foreign investment and innovation.
description: A Bill on Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) was presented to Parliament, aiming to eliminate discriminatory practices against foreign firms and streamline administrative procedures to enhance innovation.
source_quote: The Bill includes measures aimed at reducing discrimination between domestic and foreign firms.

growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating technology transfer is expected to improve agricultural productivity and innovation.
status_evidence: The proposal for technology transfer services has been announced but not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: While important for agricultural innovation, the proposal is not yet implemented.
description: Technology transfer services are proposed to enhance the technological upgrading of Turkish agriculture by disseminating information on high value-added products and their production technologies.
source_quote: Technology transfer services which have to date played a relatively limited role in the technological upgrading of Turkish farming should help to diffuse information on higher value-added and market-demanded products.

growth_orientation_rationale: By fostering a broad sphere of experimentation in employment practices, the reform aims to stimulate innovation and entrepreneurship.
component_name: Flexible Employment Forms and Tax Incentives
status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: The introduction of flexible employment forms and tax incentives represents a significant but narrower change in the startup ecosystem.
description: The Turkish authorities are considering introducing more flexible and less costly legal employment forms on an experimental basis, targeting special categories of workers in specific regions or economic zones, while also supporting business enterprises experimenting with new forms of employment through tax incentives.
source_quote: Support business enterprises experimenting with these new forms of employment, through for instance tax incentives.

growth_orientation_rationale: The impact of the proposed reform on economic growth is uncertain as it depends on the final design and implementation.
status_evidence: The reform is currently under discussion and has not yet been legislated.
importance_rationale: The reform is significant but not as transformative as major structural changes.
description: Turkey's National Employment Strategy includes ongoing discussions on a new severance pay reform aimed at enhancing flexibility in permanent labor contracts, which is crucial for improving labor market conditions.
source_quote: A severance pay reform is being prepared to make permanent labour contracts more flexible.

growth_orientation_rationale: By co-funding projects, the programme enhances the innovation capacity of SMEs, which is vital for economic development.
status_evidence: The support schemes are actively administered by KOSGEB and are available to SMEs.
importance_rationale: The establishment of multiple support schemes represents a significant enhancement of the innovation support framework for SMEs.
description: KOSGEB administers eight support schemes aimed at enhancing the capabilities of SMEs, including the R&D and Innovation Support Programme, which co-funds projects to improve innovation and productivity.
source_quote: Eight support schemes are currently administered by KOSGEB, with a total annual budget of TRY 280 million.

growth_orientation_rationale: Strengthening intellectual property rights encourages innovation and investment in high value-added sectors, which can lead to increased productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: A new Patent Law giving stronger support to high value-added activities will be adopted.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant change in the legal framework for intellectual property, which is crucial for fostering innovation and attracting investment.
description: A new Patent Law will be adopted to provide stronger support for high value-added activities, aiming to enhance innovation and protect intellectual property rights.
source_quote: A new Patent Law giving stronger support to high value-added activities will be adopted.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving digital infrastructure is essential for enhancing productivity, innovation, and competitiveness in the economy.
status_evidence: A 'Digital Turkey' masterplan will be prepared.
importance_rationale: The masterplan represents a significant initiative to enhance the digital landscape, which is crucial for modernizing the economy and fostering innovation.
description: A 'Digital Turkey' masterplan will be prepared to enhance the digital infrastructure and promote the use of technology across various sectors.
source_quote: A 'Digital Turkey' masterplan will be prepared.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing R&D spending is expected to boost innovation, leading to higher productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The government has set targets for R&D spending as part of its long-term strategy.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it addresses a critical area for enhancing Turkey's innovation capacity, although it is part of a broader set of initiatives.
description: Turkey aims to raise R&D spending, which has increased over the past decade but still falls short of the government's long-term targets. This initiative is part of a broader strategy to enhance the policy framework for innovation and experimentation.
source_quote: Raise R&D spending, which has increased over the past decade but falls short of the government’s own longer-term targets.

growth_orientation_rationale: This fund is expected to enhance R&D capabilities, leading to increased innovation and productivity in the economy.
status_evidence: The fund for early-stage R&D and design efforts has been included in the 2016 Action Plan.
importance_rationale: The establishment of this fund represents a significant step towards enhancing R&D investment, which is crucial for innovation.
description: A fund will be created to support early-stage R&D and design efforts, aimed at fostering innovation and technological development.
source_quote: A fund to be created for early stage R&D and design efforts.

growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing the costs associated with patenting, this reform is expected to stimulate innovation and enhance the competitive edge of firms.
status_evidence: Tax incentives for expenditures for patent applications have been included in the 2016 Action Plan.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it directly incentivizes innovation through financial support for patenting activities.
description: Tax incentives will be provided for expenditures related to patent applications, encouraging firms to invest in innovation.
source_quote: Tax incentives to be provided for expenditures for patent applications.

growth_orientation_rationale: This measure aims to reduce the financial barriers for innovative projects, thereby promoting entrepreneurship and innovation.
status_evidence: A credit guarantee to be established for the commercialization of innovative projects.
importance_rationale: This reform is important as it directly addresses financing challenges faced by innovative firms, enhancing their growth potential.
description: A credit guarantee will be established to support the commercialization of innovative projects, facilitating access to financing for startups and innovative firms.
source_quote: A credit guarantee to be established for the commercialization of innovative projects.
